===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ar.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "ШӯШұЩҒ", verb: "ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӯЩҲЩҠ" },
    file: { unit: "ШЁШ§ЩҠШӘ", verb: "ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӯЩҲЩҠ" },
    array: { unit: "Ш№ЩҶШөШұ", verb: "ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӯЩҲЩҠ" },
    set: { unit: "Ш№ЩҶШөШұ", verb: "ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӯЩҲЩҠ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„",
    email: "ШЁШұЩҠШҜ ШҘЩ„ЩғШӘШұЩҲЩҶЩҠ",
    url: "ШұШ§ШЁШ·",
    emoji: "ШҘЩҠЩ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҠ",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ® ЩҲЩҲЩӮШӘ ШЁЩ…Ш№ЩҠШ§Шұ ISO",
    date: "ШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ® ШЁЩ…Ш№ЩҠШ§Шұ ISO",
    time: "ЩҲЩӮШӘ ШЁЩ…Ш№ЩҠШ§Шұ ISO",
    duration: "Щ…ШҜШ© ШЁЩ…Ш№ЩҠШ§Шұ ISO",
    ipv4: "Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ IPv4",
    ipv6: "Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ IPv6",
    cidrv4: "Щ…ШҜЩү Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ ШЁШөЩҠШәШ© IPv4",
    cidrv6: "Щ…ШҜЩү Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ ШЁШөЩҠШәШ© IPv6",
    base64: "ЩҶЩҺШө ШЁШӘШұЩ…ЩҠШІ base64-encoded",
    base64url: "ЩҶЩҺШө ШЁШӘШұЩ…ЩҠШІ base64url-encoded",
    json_string: "ЩҶЩҺШө Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҮЩҠШҰШ© JSON",
    e164: "ШұЩӮЩ… ЩҮШ§ШӘЩҒ ШЁЩ…Ш№ЩҠШ§Шұ E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„Ш©: ЩҠЩҒШӘШұШ¶ ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ instanceof ${issue.expected}ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶ ШӘЩ… ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ ${received}`;
        }
        return `Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„Ш©: ЩҠЩҒШӘШұШ¶ ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ ${expected}ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶ ШӘЩ… ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„Ш©: ЩҠЩҒШӘШұШ¶ ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„: ЩҠШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ Ш§ЩҶШӘЩӮШ§ШЎ ШЈШӯШҜ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ: ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return ` ШЈЩғШЁШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШІЩ…: ЩҠЩҒШӘШұШ¶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ ${issue.origin ?? "Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш©"} ${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "Ш№ЩҶШөШұ"}`;
        return `ШЈЩғШЁШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШІЩ…: ЩҠЩҒШӘШұШ¶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ ${issue.origin ?? "Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш©"} ${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `ШЈШөШәШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШІЩ…: ЩҠЩҒШӘШұШ¶ Щ„ЩҖ ${issue.origin} ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ ${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `ШЈШөШәШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШІЩ…: ЩҠЩҒШӘШұШ¶ Щ„ЩҖ ${issue.origin} ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ ${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `ЩҶЩҺШө ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„: ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШЁШҜШЈ ШЁЩҖ "${issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `ЩҶЩҺШө ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„: ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩҶШӘЩҮЩҠ ШЁЩҖ "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `ЩҶЩҺШө ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„: ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӘШ¶Щ…Щ‘ЩҺЩҶ "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `ЩҶЩҺШө ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„: ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШ·Ш§ШЁЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format} ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `ШұЩӮЩ… ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„: ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…Ш¶Ш§Ш№ЩҒШ§ШӘ ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Ш§ШӘ" : ""} ШәШұЩҠШЁ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Ш©" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, "ШҢ ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return "Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„";
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\az.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "simvol", verb: "olmalДұdДұr" },
    file: { unit: "bayt", verb: "olmalДұdДұr" },
    array: { unit: "element", verb: "olmalДұdДұr" },
    set: { unit: "element", verb: "olmalДұdДұr" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "input",
    email: "email address",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO datetime",
    date: "ISO date",
    time: "ISO time",
    duration: "ISO duration",
    ipv4: "IPv4 address",
    ipv6: "IPv6 address",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 range",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 range",
    base64: "base64-encoded string",
    base64url: "base64url-encoded string",
    json_string: "JSON string",
    e164: "E.164 number",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "input",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `YanlДұЕҹ dЙҷyЙҷr: gГ¶zlЙҷnilЙҷn instanceof ${issue.expected}, daxil olan ${received}`;
        }
        return `YanlДұЕҹ dЙҷyЙҷr: gГ¶zlЙҷnilЙҷn ${expected}, daxil olan ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `YanlДұЕҹ dЙҷyЙҷr: gГ¶zlЙҷnilЙҷn ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `YanlДұЕҹ seГ§im: aЕҹaДҹДұdakДұlardan biri olmalДұdДұr: ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `ГҮox bГ¶yГјk: gГ¶zlЙҷnilЙҷn ${issue.origin ?? "dЙҷyЙҷr"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "element"}`;
        return `ГҮox bГ¶yГјk: gГ¶zlЙҷnilЙҷn ${issue.origin ?? "dЙҷyЙҷr"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) return `ГҮox kiГ§ik: gГ¶zlЙҷnilЙҷn ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        return `ГҮox kiГ§ik: gГ¶zlЙҷnilЙҷn ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `YanlДұЕҹ mЙҷtn: "${_issue.prefix}" ilЙҷ baЕҹlamalДұdДұr`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `YanlДұЕҹ mЙҷtn: "${_issue.suffix}" ilЙҷ bitmЙҷlidir`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `YanlДұЕҹ mЙҷtn: "${_issue.includes}" daxil olmalДұdДұr`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `YanlДұЕҹ mЙҷtn: ${_issue.pattern} Еҹablonuna uyДҹun olmalДұdДұr`;
        return `YanlДұЕҹ ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `YanlДұЕҹ ЙҷdЙҷd: ${issue.divisor} ilЙҷ bГ¶lГјnЙҷ bilЙҷn olmalДұdДұr`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `TanДұnmayan aГ§ar${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "lar" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `${issue.origin} daxilindЙҷ yanlДұЕҹ aГ§ar`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "YanlДұЕҹ dЙҷyЙҷr";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `${issue.origin} daxilindЙҷ yanlДұЕҹ dЙҷyЙҷr`;
      default:
        return `YanlДұЕҹ dЙҷyЙҷr`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\be.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

function getBelarusianPlural(count: number, one: string, few: string, many: string): string {
  const absCount = Math.abs(count);
  const lastDigit = absCount % 10;
  const lastTwoDigits = absCount % 100;

  if (lastTwoDigits >= 11 && lastTwoDigits <= 19) {
    return many;
  }

  if (lastDigit === 1) {
    return one;
  }

  if (lastDigit >= 2 && lastDigit <= 4) {
    return few;
  }

  return many;
}

interface BelarusianSizable {
  unit: {
    one: string;
    few: string;
    many: string;
  };
  verb: string;
}
const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, BelarusianSizable> = {
    string: {
      unit: {
        one: "СҒС–РјРІР°Р»",
        few: "СҒС–РјРІР°Р»СӢ",
        many: "СҒС–РјРІР°Р»Р°Сһ",
      },
      verb: "РјРөСҶСҢ",
    },
    array: {
      unit: {
        one: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮ",
        few: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮСӢ",
        many: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮР°Сһ",
      },
      verb: "РјРөСҶСҢ",
    },
    set: {
      unit: {
        one: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮ",
        few: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮСӢ",
        many: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮР°Сһ",
      },
      verb: "РјРөСҶСҢ",
    },
    file: {
      unit: {
        one: "РұР°Р№СӮ",
        few: "РұР°Р№СӮСӢ",
        many: "РұР°Р№СӮР°Сһ",
      },
      verb: "РјРөСҶСҢ",
    },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): BelarusianSizable | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "СғРІРҫРҙ",
    email: "email Р°РҙСҖР°СҒ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "СҚРјРҫРҙР·С–",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO РҙР°СӮР° С– СҮР°СҒ",
    date: "ISO РҙР°СӮР°",
    time: "ISO СҮР°СҒ",
    duration: "ISO РҝСҖР°СҶСҸРіР»Р°СҒСҶСҢ",
    ipv4: "IPv4 Р°РҙСҖР°СҒ",
    ipv6: "IPv6 Р°РҙСҖР°СҒ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 РҙСӢСҸРҝР°Р·РҫРҪ",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 РҙСӢСҸРҝР°Р·РҫРҪ",
    base64: "СҖР°РҙРҫРә Сғ С„Р°СҖРјР°СҶРө base64",
    base64url: "СҖР°РҙРҫРә Сғ С„Р°СҖРјР°СҶРө base64url",
    json_string: "JSON СҖР°РҙРҫРә",
    e164: "РҪСғРјР°СҖ E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "СғРІРҫРҙ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "Р»С–Рә",
    array: "РјР°СҒС–Сһ",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ СһРІРҫРҙ: СҮР°РәР°СһСҒСҸ instanceof ${issue.expected}, Р°СӮСҖСӢРјР°РҪР° ${received}`;
        }
        return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ СһРІРҫРҙ: СҮР°РәР°СһСҒСҸ ${expected}, Р°СӮСҖСӢРјР°РҪР° ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ СһРІРҫРҙ: СҮР°РәР°Р»Р°СҒСҸ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ РІР°СҖСӢСҸРҪСӮ: СҮР°РәР°СһСҒСҸ Р°РҙР·С–РҪ Р· ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          const maxValue = Number(issue.maximum);
          const unit = getBelarusianPlural(maxValue, sizing.unit.one, sizing.unit.few, sizing.unit.many);
          return `Р—Р°РҪР°РҙСӮР° РІСҸР»С–РәС–: СҮР°РәР°Р»Р°СҒСҸ, СҲСӮРҫ ${issue.origin ?? "Р·РҪР°СҮСҚРҪРҪРө"} РҝР°РІС–РҪРҪР° ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${unit}`;
        }
        return `Р—Р°РҪР°РҙСӮР° РІСҸР»С–РәС–: СҮР°РәР°Р»Р°СҒСҸ, СҲСӮРҫ ${issue.origin ?? "Р·РҪР°СҮСҚРҪРҪРө"} РҝР°РІС–РҪРҪР° РұСӢСҶСҢ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          const minValue = Number(issue.minimum);
          const unit = getBelarusianPlural(minValue, sizing.unit.one, sizing.unit.few, sizing.unit.many);
          return `Р—Р°РҪР°РҙСӮР° РјР°Р»СӢ: СҮР°РәР°Р»Р°СҒСҸ, СҲСӮРҫ ${issue.origin} РҝР°РІС–РҪРҪР° ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${unit}`;
        }
        return `Р—Р°РҪР°РҙСӮР° РјР°Р»СӢ: СҮР°РәР°Р»Р°СҒСҸ, СҲСӮРҫ ${issue.origin} РҝР°РІС–РҪРҪР° РұСӢСҶСҢ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ СҖР°РҙРҫРә: РҝР°РІС–РҪРөРҪ РҝР°СҮСӢРҪР°СҶСҶР° Р· "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ СҖР°РҙРҫРә: РҝР°РІС–РҪРөРҪ Р·Р°РәР°РҪСҮРІР°СҶСҶР° РҪР° "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ СҖР°РҙРҫРә: РҝР°РІС–РҪРөРҪ Р·РјСҸСҲСҮР°СҶСҢ "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ СҖР°РҙРҫРә: РҝР°РІС–РҪРөРҪ Р°РҙРҝР°РІСҸРҙР°СҶСҢ СҲР°РұР»РҫРҪСғ ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ Р»С–Рә: РҝР°РІС–РҪРөРҪ РұСӢСҶСҢ РәСҖР°СӮРҪСӢРј ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `РқРөСҖР°СҒРҝР°Р·РҪР°РҪСӢ ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "РәР»СҺСҮСӢ" : "РәР»СҺСҮ"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ РәР»СҺСҮ Сғ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ СһРІРҫРҙ";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪР°Рө Р·РҪР°СҮСҚРҪРҪРө Сһ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `РқСҸРҝСҖР°РІС–Р»СҢРҪСӢ СһРІРҫРҙ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\bg.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "СҒРёРјРІРҫР»Р°", verb: "РҙР° СҒСҠРҙСҠСҖР¶Р°" },
    file: { unit: "РұР°Р№СӮР°", verb: "РҙР° СҒСҠРҙСҠСҖР¶Р°" },
    array: { unit: "РөР»РөРјРөРҪСӮР°", verb: "РҙР° СҒСҠРҙСҠСҖР¶Р°" },
    set: { unit: "РөР»РөРјРөРҪСӮР°", verb: "РҙР° СҒСҠРҙСҠСҖР¶Р°" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "РІС…РҫРҙ",
    email: "РёРјРөР№Р» Р°РҙСҖРөСҒ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "РөРјРҫРҙР¶Рё",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO РІСҖРөРјРө",
    date: "ISO РҙР°СӮР°",
    time: "ISO РІСҖРөРјРө",
    duration: "ISO РҝСҖРҫРҙСҠР»Р¶РёСӮРөР»РҪРҫСҒСӮ",
    ipv4: "IPv4 Р°РҙСҖРөСҒ",
    ipv6: "IPv6 Р°РҙСҖРөСҒ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 РҙРёР°РҝР°Р·РҫРҪ",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 РҙРёР°РҝР°Р·РҫРҪ",
    base64: "base64-РәРҫРҙРёСҖР°РҪ РҪРёР·",
    base64url: "base64url-РәРҫРҙРёСҖР°РҪ РҪРёР·",
    json_string: "JSON РҪРёР·",
    e164: "E.164 РҪРҫРјРөСҖ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "РІС…РҫРҙ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "СҮРёСҒР»Рҫ",
    array: "РјР°СҒРёРІ",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РІС…РҫРҙ: РҫСҮР°РәРІР°РҪ instanceof ${issue.expected}, РҝРҫР»СғСҮРөРҪ ${received}`;
        }
        return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РІС…РҫРҙ: РҫСҮР°РәРІР°РҪ ${expected}, РҝРҫР»СғСҮРөРҪ ${received}`;
      }

      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РІС…РҫРҙ: РҫСҮР°РәРІР°РҪ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРҪР° РҫРҝСҶРёСҸ: РҫСҮР°РәРІР°РҪРҫ РөРҙРҪРҫ РҫСӮ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `РўРІСҠСҖРҙРө РіРҫР»СҸРјРҫ: РҫСҮР°РәРІР° СҒРө ${issue.origin ?? "СҒСӮРҫР№РҪРҫСҒСӮ"} РҙР° СҒСҠРҙСҠСҖР¶Р° ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "РөР»РөРјРөРҪСӮР°"}`;
        return `РўРІСҠСҖРҙРө РіРҫР»СҸРјРҫ: РҫСҮР°РәРІР° СҒРө ${issue.origin ?? "СҒСӮРҫР№РҪРҫСҒСӮ"} РҙР° РұСҠРҙРө ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `РўРІСҠСҖРҙРө РјР°Р»РәРҫ: РҫСҮР°РәРІР° СҒРө ${issue.origin} РҙР° СҒСҠРҙСҠСҖР¶Р° ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `РўРІСҠСҖРҙРө РјР°Р»РәРҫ: РҫСҮР°РәРІР° СҒРө ${issue.origin} РҙР° РұСҠРҙРө ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РҪРёР·: СӮСҖСҸРұРІР° РҙР° Р·Р°РҝРҫСҮРІР° СҒ "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РҪРёР·: СӮСҖСҸРұРІР° РҙР° Р·Р°РІСҠСҖСҲРІР° СҒ "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РҪРёР·: СӮСҖСҸРұРІР° РҙР° РІРәР»СҺСҮРІР° "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РҪРёР·: СӮСҖСҸРұРІР° РҙР° СҒСҠРІРҝР°РҙР° СҒ ${_issue.pattern}`;

        let invalid_adj = "РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ";

        if (_issue.format === "emoji") invalid_adj = "РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРҪРҫ";
        if (_issue.format === "datetime") invalid_adj = "РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРҪРҫ";
        if (_issue.format === "date") invalid_adj = "РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРҪР°";
        if (_issue.format === "time") invalid_adj = "РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРҪРҫ";
        if (_issue.format === "duration") invalid_adj = "РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРҪР°";

        return `${invalid_adj} ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРҪРҫ СҮРёСҒР»Рҫ: СӮСҖСҸРұРІР° РҙР° РұСҠРҙРө РәСҖР°СӮРҪРҫ РҪР° ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `РқРөСҖР°Р·РҝРҫР·РҪР°СӮ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Рё" : ""} РәР»СҺСҮ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "РҫРІРө" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РәР»СҺСҮ РІ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РІС…РҫРҙ";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРҪР° СҒСӮРҫР№РҪРҫСҒСӮ РІ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `РқРөРІР°Р»РёРҙРөРҪ РІС…РҫРҙ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ca.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "carГ cters", verb: "contenir" },
    file: { unit: "bytes", verb: "contenir" },
    array: { unit: "elements", verb: "contenir" },
    set: { unit: "elements", verb: "contenir" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "entrada",
    email: "adreГ§a electrГІnica",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "data i hora ISO",
    date: "data ISO",
    time: "hora ISO",
    duration: "durada ISO",
    ipv4: "adreГ§a IPv4",
    ipv6: "adreГ§a IPv6",
    cidrv4: "rang IPv4",
    cidrv6: "rang IPv6",
    base64: "cadena codificada en base64",
    base64url: "cadena codificada en base64url",
    json_string: "cadena JSON",
    e164: "nГәmero E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "entrada",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Tipus invГ lid: s'esperava instanceof ${issue.expected}, s'ha rebut ${received}`;
        }
        return `Tipus invГ lid: s'esperava ${expected}, s'ha rebut ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Valor invГ lid: s'esperava ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `OpciГі invГ lida: s'esperava una de ${util.joinValues(issue.values, " o ")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "com a mГ xim" : "menys de";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Massa gran: s'esperava que ${issue.origin ?? "el valor"} continguГ©s ${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elements"}`;
        return `Massa gran: s'esperava que ${issue.origin ?? "el valor"} fos ${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "com a mГӯnim" : "mГ©s de";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Massa petit: s'esperava que ${issue.origin} continguГ©s ${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Massa petit: s'esperava que ${issue.origin} fos ${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `Format invГ lid: ha de comenГ§ar amb "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Format invГ lid: ha d'acabar amb "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Format invГ lid: ha d'incloure "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Format invГ lid: ha de coincidir amb el patrГі ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Format invГ lid per a ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `NГәmero invГ lid: ha de ser mГәltiple de ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Clau${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} no reconeguda${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Clau invГ lida a ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Entrada invГ lida"; // Could also be "Tipus d'uniГі invГ lid" but "Entrada invГ lida" is more general
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Element invГ lid a ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Entrada invГ lida`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\cs.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "znakЕҜ", verb: "mГӯt" },
    file: { unit: "bajtЕҜ", verb: "mГӯt" },
    array: { unit: "prvkЕҜ", verb: "mГӯt" },
    set: { unit: "prvkЕҜ", verb: "mГӯt" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "regulГЎrnГӯ vГҪraz",
    email: "e-mailovГЎ adresa",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "datum a ДҚas ve formГЎtu ISO",
    date: "datum ve formГЎtu ISO",
    time: "ДҚas ve formГЎtu ISO",
    duration: "doba trvГЎnГӯ ISO",
    ipv4: "IPv4 adresa",
    ipv6: "IPv6 adresa",
    cidrv4: "rozsah IPv4",
    cidrv6: "rozsah IPv6",
    base64: "ЕҷetДӣzec zakГіdovanГҪ ve formГЎtu base64",
    base64url: "ЕҷetДӣzec zakГіdovanГҪ ve formГЎtu base64url",
    json_string: "ЕҷetДӣzec ve formГЎtu JSON",
    e164: "ДҚГӯslo E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "vstup",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "ДҚГӯslo",
    string: "ЕҷetДӣzec",
    function: "funkce",
    array: "pole",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `NeplatnГҪ vstup: oДҚekГЎvГЎno instanceof ${issue.expected}, obdrЕҫeno ${received}`;
        }
        return `NeplatnГҪ vstup: oДҚekГЎvГЎno ${expected}, obdrЕҫeno ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `NeplatnГҪ vstup: oДҚekГЎvГЎno ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `NeplatnГЎ moЕҫnost: oДҚekГЎvГЎna jedna z hodnot ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Hodnota je pЕҷГӯliЕЎ velkГЎ: ${issue.origin ?? "hodnota"} musГӯ mГӯt ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "prvkЕҜ"}`;
        }
        return `Hodnota je pЕҷГӯliЕЎ velkГЎ: ${issue.origin ?? "hodnota"} musГӯ bГҪt ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Hodnota je pЕҷГӯliЕЎ malГЎ: ${issue.origin ?? "hodnota"} musГӯ mГӯt ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "prvkЕҜ"}`;
        }
        return `Hodnota je pЕҷГӯliЕЎ malГЎ: ${issue.origin ?? "hodnota"} musГӯ bГҪt ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `NeplatnГҪ ЕҷetДӣzec: musГӯ zaДҚГӯnat na "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `NeplatnГҪ ЕҷetДӣzec: musГӯ konДҚit na "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `NeplatnГҪ ЕҷetДӣzec: musГӯ obsahovat "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `NeplatnГҪ ЕҷetДӣzec: musГӯ odpovГӯdat vzoru ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `NeplatnГҪ formГЎt ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `NeplatnГ© ДҚГӯslo: musГӯ bГҪt nГЎsobkem ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `NeznГЎmГ© klГӯДҚe: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `NeplatnГҪ klГӯДҚ v ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "NeplatnГҪ vstup";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `NeplatnГЎ hodnota v ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `NeplatnГҪ vstup`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\da.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "tegn", verb: "havde" },
    file: { unit: "bytes", verb: "havde" },
    array: { unit: "elementer", verb: "indeholdt" },
    set: { unit: "elementer", verb: "indeholdt" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "input",
    email: "e-mailadresse",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO dato- og klokkeslГҰt",
    date: "ISO-dato",
    time: "ISO-klokkeslГҰt",
    duration: "ISO-varighed",
    ipv4: "IPv4-omrГҘde",
    ipv6: "IPv6-omrГҘde",
    cidrv4: "IPv4-spektrum",
    cidrv6: "IPv6-spektrum",
    base64: "base64-kodet streng",
    base64url: "base64url-kodet streng",
    json_string: "JSON-streng",
    e164: "E.164-nummer",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "input",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    string: "streng",
    number: "tal",
    boolean: "boolean",
    array: "liste",
    object: "objekt",
    set: "sГҰt",
    file: "fil",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Ugyldigt input: forventede instanceof ${issue.expected}, fik ${received}`;
        }
        return `Ugyldigt input: forventede ${expected}, fik ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Ugyldig vГҰrdi: forventede ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Ugyldigt valg: forventede en af fГёlgende ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const origin = TypeDictionary[issue.origin] ?? issue.origin;
        if (sizing)
          return `For stor: forventede ${origin ?? "value"} ${sizing.verb} ${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementer"}`;
        return `For stor: forventede ${origin ?? "value"} havde ${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const origin = TypeDictionary[issue.origin] ?? issue.origin;
        if (sizing) {
          return `For lille: forventede ${origin} ${sizing.verb} ${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `For lille: forventede ${origin} havde ${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `Ugyldig streng: skal starte med "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Ugyldig streng: skal ende med "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Ugyldig streng: skal indeholde "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Ugyldig streng: skal matche mГёnsteret ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Ugyldig ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Ugyldigt tal: skal vГҰre deleligt med ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Ukendte nГёgler" : "Ukendt nГёgle"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Ugyldig nГёgle i ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Ugyldigt input: matcher ingen af de tilladte typer";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Ugyldig vГҰrdi i ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Ugyldigt input`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\de.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "Zeichen", verb: "zu haben" },
    file: { unit: "Bytes", verb: "zu haben" },
    array: { unit: "Elemente", verb: "zu haben" },
    set: { unit: "Elemente", verb: "zu haben" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "Eingabe",
    email: "E-Mail-Adresse",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "Emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO-Datum und -Uhrzeit",
    date: "ISO-Datum",
    time: "ISO-Uhrzeit",
    duration: "ISO-Dauer",
    ipv4: "IPv4-Adresse",
    ipv6: "IPv6-Adresse",
    cidrv4: "IPv4-Bereich",
    cidrv6: "IPv6-Bereich",
    base64: "Base64-codierter String",
    base64url: "Base64-URL-codierter String",
    json_string: "JSON-String",
    e164: "E.164-Nummer",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "Eingabe",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "Zahl",
    array: "Array",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `UngГјltige Eingabe: erwartet instanceof ${issue.expected}, erhalten ${received}`;
        }
        return `UngГјltige Eingabe: erwartet ${expected}, erhalten ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `UngГјltige Eingabe: erwartet ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `UngГјltige Option: erwartet eine von ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Zu groГҹ: erwartet, dass ${issue.origin ?? "Wert"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "Elemente"} hat`;
        return `Zu groГҹ: erwartet, dass ${issue.origin ?? "Wert"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ist`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Zu klein: erwartet, dass ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit} hat`;
        }

        return `Zu klein: erwartet, dass ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ist`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `UngГјltiger String: muss mit "${_issue.prefix}" beginnen`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `UngГјltiger String: muss mit "${_issue.suffix}" enden`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `UngГјltiger String: muss "${_issue.includes}" enthalten`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `UngГјltiger String: muss dem Muster ${_issue.pattern} entsprechen`;
        return `UngГјltig: ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `UngГјltige Zahl: muss ein Vielfaches von ${issue.divisor} sein`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Unbekannte SchlГјssel" : "Unbekannter SchlГјssel"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `UngГјltiger SchlГјssel in ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "UngГјltige Eingabe";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `UngГјltiger Wert in ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `UngГјltige Eingabe`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\en.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "characters", verb: "to have" },
    file: { unit: "bytes", verb: "to have" },
    array: { unit: "items", verb: "to have" },
    set: { unit: "items", verb: "to have" },
    map: { unit: "entries", verb: "to have" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "input",
    email: "email address",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO datetime",
    date: "ISO date",
    time: "ISO time",
    duration: "ISO duration",
    ipv4: "IPv4 address",
    ipv6: "IPv6 address",
    mac: "MAC address",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 range",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 range",
    base64: "base64-encoded string",
    base64url: "base64url-encoded string",
    json_string: "JSON string",
    e164: "E.164 number",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "input",
  };

  // type names: missing keys = do not translate (use raw value via ?? fallback)
  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    // Compatibility: "nan" -> "NaN" for display
    nan: "NaN",
    // All other type names omitted - they fall back to raw values via ?? operator
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        return `Invalid input: expected ${expected}, received ${received}`;
      }

      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Invalid input: expected ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Invalid option: expected one of ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Too big: expected ${issue.origin ?? "value"} to have ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elements"}`;
        return `Too big: expected ${issue.origin ?? "value"} to be ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Too small: expected ${issue.origin} to have ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Too small: expected ${issue.origin} to be ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `Invalid string: must start with "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Invalid string: must end with "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Invalid string: must include "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Invalid string: must match pattern ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Invalid ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Invalid number: must be a multiple of ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Unrecognized key${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Invalid key in ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Invalid input";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Invalid value in ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Invalid input`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\eo.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "karaktrojn", verb: "havi" },
    file: { unit: "bajtojn", verb: "havi" },
    array: { unit: "elementojn", verb: "havi" },
    set: { unit: "elementojn", verb: "havi" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "enigo",
    email: "retadreso",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoДқio",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO-datotempo",
    date: "ISO-dato",
    time: "ISO-tempo",
    duration: "ISO-daЕӯro",
    ipv4: "IPv4-adreso",
    ipv6: "IPv6-adreso",
    cidrv4: "IPv4-rango",
    cidrv6: "IPv6-rango",
    base64: "64-ume kodita karaktraro",
    base64url: "URL-64-ume kodita karaktraro",
    json_string: "JSON-karaktraro",
    e164: "E.164-nombro",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "enigo",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "nombro",
    array: "tabelo",
    null: "senvalora",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Nevalida enigo: atendiДқis instanceof ${issue.expected}, riceviДқis ${received}`;
        }
        return `Nevalida enigo: atendiДқis ${expected}, riceviДқis ${received}`;
      }

      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Nevalida enigo: atendiДқis ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Nevalida opcio: atendiДқis unu el ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Tro granda: atendiДқis ke ${issue.origin ?? "valoro"} havu ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementojn"}`;
        return `Tro granda: atendiДқis ke ${issue.origin ?? "valoro"} havu ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Tro malgranda: atendiДқis ke ${issue.origin} havu ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Tro malgranda: atendiДқis ke ${issue.origin} estu ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `Nevalida karaktraro: devas komenciДқi per "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Nevalida karaktraro: devas finiДқi per "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Nevalida karaktraro: devas inkluzivi "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Nevalida karaktraro: devas kongrui kun la modelo ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Nevalida ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Nevalida nombro: devas esti oblo de ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Nekonata${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "j" : ""} Еқlosilo${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "j" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Nevalida Еқlosilo en ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Nevalida enigo";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Nevalida valoro en ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Nevalida enigo`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\es.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "caracteres", verb: "tener" },
    file: { unit: "bytes", verb: "tener" },
    array: { unit: "elementos", verb: "tener" },
    set: { unit: "elementos", verb: "tener" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "entrada",
    email: "direcciГіn de correo electrГіnico",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "fecha y hora ISO",
    date: "fecha ISO",
    time: "hora ISO",
    duration: "duraciГіn ISO",
    ipv4: "direcciГіn IPv4",
    ipv6: "direcciГіn IPv6",
    cidrv4: "rango IPv4",
    cidrv6: "rango IPv6",
    base64: "cadena codificada en base64",
    base64url: "URL codificada en base64",
    json_string: "cadena JSON",
    e164: "nГәmero E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "entrada",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    string: "texto",
    number: "nГәmero",
    boolean: "booleano",
    array: "arreglo",
    object: "objeto",
    set: "conjunto",
    file: "archivo",
    date: "fecha",
    bigint: "nГәmero grande",
    symbol: "sГӯmbolo",
    undefined: "indefinido",
    null: "nulo",
    function: "funciГіn",
    map: "mapa",
    record: "registro",
    tuple: "tupla",
    enum: "enumeraciГіn",
    union: "uniГіn",
    literal: "literal",
    promise: "promesa",
    void: "vacГӯo",
    never: "nunca",
    unknown: "desconocido",
    any: "cualquiera",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Entrada invГЎlida: se esperaba instanceof ${issue.expected}, recibido ${received}`;
        }
        return `Entrada invГЎlida: se esperaba ${expected}, recibido ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `Entrada invГЎlida: se esperaba ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `OpciГіn invГЎlida: se esperaba una de ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const origin = TypeDictionary[issue.origin] ?? issue.origin;
        if (sizing)
          return `Demasiado grande: se esperaba que ${origin ?? "valor"} tuviera ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementos"}`;
        return `Demasiado grande: se esperaba que ${origin ?? "valor"} fuera ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const origin = TypeDictionary[issue.origin] ?? issue.origin;
        if (sizing) {
          return `Demasiado pequeГұo: se esperaba que ${origin} tuviera ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Demasiado pequeГұo: se esperaba que ${origin} fuera ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `Cadena invГЎlida: debe comenzar con "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Cadena invГЎlida: debe terminar en "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Cadena invГЎlida: debe incluir "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Cadena invГЎlida: debe coincidir con el patrГіn ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `InvГЎlido ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `NГәmero invГЎlido: debe ser mГәltiplo de ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Llave${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} desconocida${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Llave invГЎlida en ${TypeDictionary[issue.origin] ?? issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Entrada invГЎlida";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Valor invГЎlido en ${TypeDictionary[issue.origin] ?? issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Entrada invГЎlida`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\fa.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "Ъ©Ш§ШұШ§Ъ©ШӘШұ", verb: "ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ" },
    file: { unit: "ШЁШ§ЫҢШӘ", verb: "ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ" },
    array: { unit: "ШўЫҢШӘЩ…", verb: "ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ" },
    set: { unit: "ШўЫҢШӘЩ…", verb: "ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЫҢ",
    email: "ШўШҜШұШі Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЩҲШ¬ЫҢ",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® ЩҲ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЫҢШІЩҲ",
    date: "ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ® Ш§ЫҢШІЩҲ",
    time: "ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЫҢШІЩҲ",
    duration: "Щ…ШҜШӘ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЫҢШІЩҲ",
    ipv4: "IPv4 ШўШҜШұШі",
    ipv6: "IPv6 ШўШҜШұШі",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҶЩҮ",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҶЩҮ",
    base64: "base64-encoded ШұШҙШӘЩҮ",
    base64url: "base64url-encoded ШұШҙШӘЩҮ",
    json_string: "JSON ШұШҙШӘЩҮ",
    e164: "E.164 Ш№ШҜШҜ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЫҢ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "Ш№ШҜШҜ",
    array: "ШўШұШ§ЫҢЩҮ",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЫҢ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ: Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ§ЫҢШіШӘ instanceof ${issue.expected} Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁЩҲШҜШҢ ${received} ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШҙШҜ`;
        }
        return `ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЫҢ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ: Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ§ЫҢШіШӘ ${expected} Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁЩҲШҜШҢ ${received} ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘ ШҙШҜ`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) {
          return `ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЫҢ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ: Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ§ЫҢШіШӘ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])} Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁЩҲШҜ`;
        }
        return `ЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ: Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ§ЫҢШіШӘ ЫҢЪ©ЫҢ Ш§ШІ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")} Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁЩҲШҜ`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Ш®ЫҢЩ„ЫҢ ШЁШІШұЪҜ: ${issue.origin ?? "Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ"} ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "Ш№ЩҶШөШұ"} ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ`;
        }
        return `Ш®ЫҢЩ„ЫҢ ШЁШІШұЪҜ: ${issue.origin ?? "Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ"} ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Ш®ЫҢЩ„ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҲЪҶЪ©: ${issue.origin} ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit} ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ`;
        }
        return `Ш®ЫҢЩ„ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҲЪҶЪ©: ${issue.origin} ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `ШұШҙШӘЩҮ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШЁШ§ "${_issue.prefix}" ШҙШұЩҲШ№ ШҙЩҲШҜ`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") {
          return `ШұШҙШӘЩҮ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШЁШ§ "${_issue.suffix}" ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… ШҙЩҲШҜ`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "includes") {
          return `ШұШҙШӘЩҮ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ "${_issue.includes}" ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "regex") {
          return `ШұШҙШӘЩҮ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШЁШ§ Ш§Щ„ЪҜЩҲЫҢ ${_issue.pattern} Щ…Ш·Ш§ШЁЩӮШӘ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ`;
        }
        return `${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format} ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Ш№ШҜШҜ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ Щ…Ш¶ШұШЁ ${issue.divisor} ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "ЩҮШ§ЫҢ" : ""} ЩҶШ§ШҙЩҶШ§Ші: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ ЩҶШ§ШҙЩҶШ§Ші ШҜШұ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return `ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЫҢ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ`;
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Щ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ ШҜШұ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЫҢ ЩҶШ§Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\fi.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; subject: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "merkkiГӨ", subject: "merkkijonon" },
    file: { unit: "tavua", subject: "tiedoston" },
    array: { unit: "alkiota", subject: "listan" },
    set: { unit: "alkiota", subject: "joukon" },
    number: { unit: "", subject: "luvun" },
    bigint: { unit: "", subject: "suuren kokonaisluvun" },
    int: { unit: "", subject: "kokonaisluvun" },
    date: { unit: "", subject: "pГӨivГӨmГӨГӨrГӨn" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; subject: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "sГӨГӨnnГ¶llinen lauseke",
    email: "sГӨhkГ¶postiosoite",
    url: "URL-osoite",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO-aikaleima",
    date: "ISO-pГӨivГӨmГӨГӨrГӨ",
    time: "ISO-aika",
    duration: "ISO-kesto",
    ipv4: "IPv4-osoite",
    ipv6: "IPv6-osoite",
    cidrv4: "IPv4-alue",
    cidrv6: "IPv6-alue",
    base64: "base64-koodattu merkkijono",
    base64url: "base64url-koodattu merkkijono",
    json_string: "JSON-merkkijono",
    e164: "E.164-luku",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "templaattimerkkijono",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Virheellinen tyyppi: odotettiin instanceof ${issue.expected}, oli ${received}`;
        }
        return `Virheellinen tyyppi: odotettiin ${expected}, oli ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `Virheellinen syГ¶te: tГӨytyy olla ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Virheellinen valinta: tГӨytyy olla yksi seuraavista: ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Liian suuri: ${sizing.subject} tГӨytyy olla ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`.trim();
        }
        return `Liian suuri: arvon tГӨytyy olla ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Liian pieni: ${sizing.subject} tГӨytyy olla ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`.trim();
        }
        return `Liian pieni: arvon tГӨytyy olla ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `Virheellinen syГ¶te: tГӨytyy alkaa "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Virheellinen syГ¶te: tГӨytyy loppua "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Virheellinen syГ¶te: tГӨytyy sisГӨltГӨГӨ "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") {
          return `Virheellinen syГ¶te: tГӨytyy vastata sГӨГӨnnГ¶llistГӨ lauseketta ${_issue.pattern}`;
        }
        return `Virheellinen ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Virheellinen luku: tГӨytyy olla luvun ${issue.divisor} monikerta`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Tuntemattomat avaimet" : "Tuntematon avain"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return "Virheellinen avain tietueessa";
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Virheellinen unioni";
      case "invalid_element":
        return "Virheellinen arvo joukossa";
      default:
        return `Virheellinen syГ¶te`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\fr-CA.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "caractГЁres", verb: "avoir" },
    file: { unit: "octets", verb: "avoir" },
    array: { unit: "Г©lГ©ments", verb: "avoir" },
    set: { unit: "Г©lГ©ments", verb: "avoir" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "entrГ©e",
    email: "adresse courriel",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "date-heure ISO",
    date: "date ISO",
    time: "heure ISO",
    duration: "durГ©e ISO",
    ipv4: "adresse IPv4",
    ipv6: "adresse IPv6",
    cidrv4: "plage IPv4",
    cidrv6: "plage IPv6",
    base64: "chaГ®ne encodГ©e en base64",
    base64url: "chaГ®ne encodГ©e en base64url",
    json_string: "chaГ®ne JSON",
    e164: "numГ©ro E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "entrГ©e",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `EntrГ©e invalide : attendu instanceof ${issue.expected}, reГ§u ${received}`;
        }
        return `EntrГ©e invalide : attendu ${expected}, reГ§u ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `EntrГ©e invalide : attendu ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Option invalide : attendu l'une des valeurs suivantes ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "вүӨ" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Trop grand : attendu que ${issue.origin ?? "la valeur"} ait ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        return `Trop grand : attendu que ${issue.origin ?? "la valeur"} soit ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "вүҘ" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Trop petit : attendu que ${issue.origin} ait ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Trop petit : attendu que ${issue.origin} soit ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `ChaГ®ne invalide : doit commencer par "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `ChaГ®ne invalide : doit se terminer par "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `ChaГ®ne invalide : doit inclure "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `ChaГ®ne invalide : doit correspondre au motif ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format} invalide`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Nombre invalide : doit ГӘtre un multiple de ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `ClГ©${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} non reconnue${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} : ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `ClГ© invalide dans ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "EntrГ©e invalide";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Valeur invalide dans ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `EntrГ©e invalide`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\fr.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "caractГЁres", verb: "avoir" },
    file: { unit: "octets", verb: "avoir" },
    array: { unit: "Г©lГ©ments", verb: "avoir" },
    set: { unit: "Г©lГ©ments", verb: "avoir" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "entrГ©e",
    email: "adresse e-mail",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "date et heure ISO",
    date: "date ISO",
    time: "heure ISO",
    duration: "durГ©e ISO",
    ipv4: "adresse IPv4",
    ipv6: "adresse IPv6",
    cidrv4: "plage IPv4",
    cidrv6: "plage IPv6",
    base64: "chaГ®ne encodГ©e en base64",
    base64url: "chaГ®ne encodГ©e en base64url",
    json_string: "chaГ®ne JSON",
    e164: "numГ©ro E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "entrГ©e",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "nombre",
    array: "tableau",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `EntrГ©e invalide : instanceof ${issue.expected} attendu, ${received} reГ§u`;
        }
        return `EntrГ©e invalide : ${expected} attendu, ${received} reГ§u`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `EntrГ©e invalide : ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])} attendu`;
        return `Option invalide : une valeur parmi ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")} attendue`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Trop grand : ${issue.origin ?? "valeur"} doit ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "Г©lГ©ment(s)"}`;
        return `Trop grand : ${issue.origin ?? "valeur"} doit ГӘtre ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Trop petit : ${issue.origin} doit ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Trop petit : ${issue.origin} doit ГӘtre ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `ChaГ®ne invalide : doit commencer par "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `ChaГ®ne invalide : doit se terminer par "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `ChaГ®ne invalide : doit inclure "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `ChaГ®ne invalide : doit correspondre au modГЁle ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format} invalide`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Nombre invalide : doit ГӘtre un multiple de ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `ClГ©${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} non reconnue${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} : ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `ClГ© invalide dans ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "EntrГ©e invalide";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Valeur invalide dans ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `EntrГ©e invalide`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\he.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  // Hebrew labels + grammatical gender
  const TypeNames: Record<string, { label: string; gender: "m" | "f" }> = {
    string: { label: "ЧһЧ—ЧЁЧ•Ч–ЧӘ", gender: "f" },
    number: { label: "ЧһЧЎЧӨЧЁ", gender: "m" },
    boolean: { label: "ЧўЧЁЧҡ Ч‘Ч•ЧңЧҷЧҗЧ Чҷ", gender: "m" },
    bigint: { label: "BigInt", gender: "m" },
    date: { label: "ЧӘЧҗЧЁЧҷЧҡ", gender: "m" },
    array: { label: "ЧһЧўЧЁЧҡ", gender: "m" },
    object: { label: "ЧҗЧ•Ч‘ЧҷЧҷЧ§Чҳ", gender: "m" },
    null: { label: "ЧўЧЁЧҡ ЧЁЧҷЧ§ (null)", gender: "m" },
    undefined: { label: "ЧўЧЁЧҡ ЧңЧҗ ЧһЧ•Ч’Ч“ЧЁ (undefined)", gender: "m" },
    symbol: { label: "ЧЎЧҷЧһЧ‘Ч•Чң (Symbol)", gender: "m" },
    function: { label: "ЧӨЧ•Ч Ч§ЧҰЧҷЧ”", gender: "f" },
    map: { label: "ЧһЧӨЧ” (Map)", gender: "f" },
    set: { label: "Ч§Ч‘Ч•ЧҰЧ” (Set)", gender: "f" },
    file: { label: "Ч§Ч•Ч‘ЧҘ", gender: "m" },
    promise: { label: "Promise", gender: "m" },
    NaN: { label: "NaN", gender: "m" },
    unknown: { label: "ЧўЧЁЧҡ ЧңЧҗ ЧҷЧ“Ч•Чў", gender: "m" },
    value: { label: "ЧўЧЁЧҡ", gender: "m" },
  };

  // Sizing units for size-related messages + localized origin labels
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; shortLabel?: string; longLabel?: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "ЧӘЧ•Ч•ЧҷЧқ", shortLabel: "Ч§ЧҰЧЁ", longLabel: "ЧҗЧЁЧ•Чҡ" },
    file: { unit: "Ч‘ЧҷЧҷЧҳЧҷЧқ", shortLabel: "Ч§ЧҳЧҹ", longLabel: "Ч’Ч“Ч•Чң" },
    array: { unit: "ЧӨЧЁЧҷЧҳЧҷЧқ", shortLabel: "Ч§ЧҳЧҹ", longLabel: "Ч’Ч“Ч•Чң" },
    set: { unit: "ЧӨЧЁЧҷЧҳЧҷЧқ", shortLabel: "Ч§ЧҳЧҹ", longLabel: "Ч’Ч“Ч•Чң" },
    number: { unit: "", shortLabel: "Ч§ЧҳЧҹ", longLabel: "Ч’Ч“Ч•Чң" }, // no unit
  };

  // Helpers вҖ” labels, articles, and verbs
  const typeEntry = (t?: string | null) => (t ? TypeNames[t] : undefined);

  const typeLabel = (t?: string | null): string => {
    const e = typeEntry(t);
    if (e) return e.label;
    // fallback: show raw string if unknown
    return t ?? TypeNames.unknown.label;
  };

  const withDefinite = (t?: string | null): string => `Ч”${typeLabel(t)}`;

  const verbFor = (t?: string | null): string => {
    const e = typeEntry(t);
    const gender = e?.gender ?? "m";
    return gender === "f" ? "ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧӣЧ” ЧңЧ”ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ" : "ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧҡ ЧңЧ”ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ";
  };

  const getSizing = (origin?: string | null) => {
    if (!origin) return null;
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  };

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats]: { label: string; gender: "m" | "f" };
  } = {
    regex: { label: "Ч§ЧңЧҳ", gender: "m" },
    email: { label: "ЧӣЧӘЧ•Ч‘ЧӘ ЧҗЧҷЧһЧҷЧҷЧң", gender: "f" },
    url: { label: "ЧӣЧӘЧ•Ч‘ЧӘ ЧЁЧ©ЧӘ", gender: "f" },
    emoji: { label: "ЧҗЧҷЧһЧ•Ч’'Чҷ", gender: "m" },
    uuid: { label: "UUID", gender: "m" },
    nanoid: { label: "nanoid", gender: "m" },
    guid: { label: "GUID", gender: "m" },
    cuid: { label: "cuid", gender: "m" },
    cuid2: { label: "cuid2", gender: "m" },
    ulid: { label: "ULID", gender: "m" },
    xid: { label: "XID", gender: "m" },
    ksuid: { label: "KSUID", gender: "m" },
    datetime: { label: "ЧӘЧҗЧЁЧҷЧҡ Ч•Ч–ЧһЧҹ ISO", gender: "m" },
    date: { label: "ЧӘЧҗЧЁЧҷЧҡ ISO", gender: "m" },
    time: { label: "Ч–ЧһЧҹ ISO", gender: "m" },
    duration: { label: "ЧһЧ©Чҡ Ч–ЧһЧҹ ISO", gender: "m" },
    ipv4: { label: "ЧӣЧӘЧ•Ч‘ЧӘ IPv4", gender: "f" },
    ipv6: { label: "ЧӣЧӘЧ•Ч‘ЧӘ IPv6", gender: "f" },
    cidrv4: { label: "ЧҳЧ•Ч•Ч— IPv4", gender: "m" },
    cidrv6: { label: "ЧҳЧ•Ч•Ч— IPv6", gender: "m" },
    base64: { label: "ЧһЧ—ЧЁЧ•Ч–ЧӘ Ч‘Ч‘ЧЎЧҷЧЎ 64", gender: "f" },
    base64url: { label: "ЧһЧ—ЧЁЧ•Ч–ЧӘ Ч‘Ч‘ЧЎЧҷЧЎ 64 ЧңЧӣЧӘЧ•Ч‘Ч•ЧӘ ЧЁЧ©ЧӘ", gender: "f" },
    json_string: { label: "ЧһЧ—ЧЁЧ•Ч–ЧӘ JSON", gender: "f" },
    e164: { label: "ЧһЧЎЧӨЧЁ E.164", gender: "m" },
    jwt: { label: "JWT", gender: "m" },
    ends_with: { label: "Ч§ЧңЧҳ", gender: "m" },
    includes: { label: "Ч§ЧңЧҳ", gender: "m" },
    lowercase: { label: "Ч§ЧңЧҳ", gender: "m" },
    starts_with: { label: "Ч§ЧңЧҳ", gender: "m" },
    uppercase: { label: "Ч§ЧңЧҳ", gender: "m" },
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        // Expected type: show without definite article for clearer Hebrew
        const expectedKey = issue.expected as string | undefined;
        const expected = TypeDictionary[expectedKey ?? ""] ?? typeLabel(expectedKey);
        // Received: show localized label if known, otherwise constructor/raw
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? TypeNames[receivedType]?.label ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Ч§ЧңЧҳ ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ: ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧҡ ЧңЧ”ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ instanceof ${issue.expected}, Ч”ЧӘЧ§Ч‘Чң ${received}`;
        }
        return `Ч§ЧңЧҳ ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ: ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧҡ ЧңЧ”ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ ${expected}, Ч”ЧӘЧ§Ч‘Чң ${received}`;
      }

      case "invalid_value": {
        if (issue.values.length === 1) {
          return `ЧўЧЁЧҡ ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ: Ч”ЧўЧЁЧҡ Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧ‘ ЧңЧ”ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        }
        // Join values with proper Hebrew formatting
        const stringified = issue.values.map((v) => util.stringifyPrimitive(v));
        if (issue.values.length === 2) {
          return `ЧўЧЁЧҡ ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ: Ч”ЧҗЧӨЧ©ЧЁЧ•ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ Ч”ЧһЧӘЧҗЧҷЧһЧ•ЧӘ Ч”Чҹ ${stringified[0]} ЧҗЧ• ${stringified[1]}`;
        }
        // For 3+ values: "a", "b" ЧҗЧ• "c"
        const lastValue = stringified[stringified.length - 1];
        const restValues = stringified.slice(0, -1).join(", ");
        return `ЧўЧЁЧҡ ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ: Ч”ЧҗЧӨЧ©ЧЁЧ•ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ Ч”ЧһЧӘЧҗЧҷЧһЧ•ЧӘ Ч”Чҹ ${restValues} ЧҗЧ• ${lastValue}`;
      }

      case "too_big": {
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const subject = withDefinite(issue.origin ?? "value");

        if (issue.origin === "string") {
          // Special handling for strings - more natural Hebrew
