          return `${sizing?.longLabel ?? "ЧҗЧЁЧ•Чҡ"} ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧӣЧ” ЧңЧ”ЧӣЧҷЧң ${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing?.unit ?? ""} ${issue.inclusive ? "ЧҗЧ• ЧӨЧ—Ч•ЧӘ" : "ЧңЧӣЧң Ч”ЧҷЧ•ЧӘЧЁ"}`.trim();
        }

        if (issue.origin === "number") {
          // Natural Hebrew for numbers
          const comparison = issue.inclusive ? `Ч§ЧҳЧҹ ЧҗЧ• Ч©Ч•Ч•Ч” Чң-${issue.maximum}` : `Ч§ЧҳЧҹ Чһ-${issue.maximum}`;
          return `Ч’Ч“Ч•Чң ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧҡ ЧңЧ”ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ ${comparison}`;
        }

        if (issue.origin === "array" || issue.origin === "set") {
          // Natural Hebrew for arrays and sets
          const verb = issue.origin === "set" ? "ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧӣЧ”" : "ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧҡ";
          const comparison = issue.inclusive
            ? `${issue.maximum} ${sizing?.unit ?? ""} ЧҗЧ• ЧӨЧ—Ч•ЧӘ`
            : `ЧӨЧ—Ч•ЧӘ Чһ-${issue.maximum} ${sizing?.unit ?? ""}`;
          return `Ч’Ч“Ч•Чң ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ${verb} ЧңЧ”ЧӣЧҷЧң ${comparison}`.trim();
        }

        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const be = verbFor(issue.origin ?? "value");
        if (sizing?.unit) {
          return `${sizing.longLabel} ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ${be} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }
        return `${sizing?.longLabel ?? "Ч’Ч“Ч•Чң"} ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ${be} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }

      case "too_small": {
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const subject = withDefinite(issue.origin ?? "value");

        if (issue.origin === "string") {
          // Special handling for strings - more natural Hebrew
          return `${sizing?.shortLabel ?? "Ч§ЧҰЧЁ"} ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧӣЧ” ЧңЧ”ЧӣЧҷЧң ${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing?.unit ?? ""} ${issue.inclusive ? "ЧҗЧ• ЧҷЧ•ЧӘЧЁ" : "ЧңЧӨЧ—Ч•ЧӘ"}`.trim();
        }

        if (issue.origin === "number") {
          // Natural Hebrew for numbers
          const comparison = issue.inclusive ? `Ч’Ч“Ч•Чң ЧҗЧ• Ч©Ч•Ч•Ч” Чң-${issue.minimum}` : `Ч’Ч“Ч•Чң Чһ-${issue.minimum}`;
          return `Ч§ЧҳЧҹ ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧҡ ЧңЧ”ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ ${comparison}`;
        }

        if (issue.origin === "array" || issue.origin === "set") {
          // Natural Hebrew for arrays and sets
          const verb = issue.origin === "set" ? "ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧӣЧ”" : "ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧҡ";

          // Special case for singular (minimum === 1)
          if (issue.minimum === 1 && issue.inclusive) {
            const singularPhrase = issue.origin === "set" ? "ЧңЧӨЧ—Ч•ЧӘ ЧӨЧЁЧҷЧҳ ЧҗЧ—Ч“" : "ЧңЧӨЧ—Ч•ЧӘ ЧӨЧЁЧҷЧҳ ЧҗЧ—Ч“";
            return `Ч§ЧҳЧҹ ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ${verb} ЧңЧ”ЧӣЧҷЧң ${singularPhrase}`;
          }

          const comparison = issue.inclusive
            ? `${issue.minimum} ${sizing?.unit ?? ""} ЧҗЧ• ЧҷЧ•ЧӘЧЁ`
            : `ЧҷЧ•ЧӘЧЁ Чһ-${issue.minimum} ${sizing?.unit ?? ""}`;
          return `Ч§ЧҳЧҹ ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ${verb} ЧңЧ”ЧӣЧҷЧң ${comparison}`.trim();
        }

        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const be = verbFor(issue.origin ?? "value");
        if (sizing?.unit) {
          return `${sizing.shortLabel} ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ${be} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }
        return `${sizing?.shortLabel ?? "Ч§ЧҳЧҹ"} ЧһЧ“Чҷ: ${subject} ${be} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }

      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        // These apply to strings вҖ” use feminine grammar + Ч”Чі Ч”ЧҷЧ“ЧҷЧўЧ”
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `Ч”ЧһЧ—ЧЁЧ•Ч–ЧӘ Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧ‘ЧӘ ЧңЧ”ЧӘЧ—ЧҷЧң Ч‘ "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Ч”ЧһЧ—ЧЁЧ•Ч–ЧӘ Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧ‘ЧӘ ЧңЧ”ЧЎЧӘЧҷЧҷЧқ Ч‘ "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Ч”ЧһЧ—ЧЁЧ•Ч–ЧӘ Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧ‘ЧӘ ЧңЧӣЧңЧ•Чң "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Ч”ЧһЧ—ЧЁЧ•Ч–ЧӘ Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧ‘ЧӘ ЧңЧ”ЧӘЧҗЧҷЧқ ЧңЧӘЧ‘Ч ЧҷЧӘ ${_issue.pattern}`;

        // Handle gender agreement for formats
        const nounEntry = FormatDictionary[_issue.format];
        const noun = nounEntry?.label ?? _issue.format;
        const gender = nounEntry?.gender ?? "m";
        const adjective = gender === "f" ? "ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧ Ч”" : "ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ";
        return `${noun} ЧңЧҗ ${adjective}`;
      }

      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `ЧһЧЎЧӨЧЁ ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ: Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧ‘ ЧңЧ”ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ ЧһЧӣЧӨЧңЧ” Ч©Чң ${issue.divisor}`;

      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `ЧһЧӨЧӘЧ—${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Ч•ЧӘ" : ""} ЧңЧҗ ЧһЧ–Ч•Ч”${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "ЧҷЧқ" : "Ч”"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;

      case "invalid_key": {
        return `Ч©Ч“Ч” ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ Ч‘ЧҗЧ•Ч‘ЧҷЧҷЧ§Чҳ`;
      }

      case "invalid_union":
        return "Ч§ЧңЧҳ ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ";

      case "invalid_element": {
        const place = withDefinite(issue.origin ?? "array");
        return `ЧўЧЁЧҡ ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ Ч‘${place}`;
      }

      default:
        return `Ч§ЧңЧҳ ЧңЧҗ ЧӘЧ§ЧҷЧҹ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\hu.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "karakter", verb: "legyen" },
    file: { unit: "byte", verb: "legyen" },
    array: { unit: "elem", verb: "legyen" },
    set: { unit: "elem", verb: "legyen" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "bemenet",
    email: "email cГӯm",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO idЕ‘bГ©lyeg",
    date: "ISO dГЎtum",
    time: "ISO idЕ‘",
    duration: "ISO idЕ‘intervallum",
    ipv4: "IPv4 cГӯm",
    ipv6: "IPv6 cГӯm",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 tartomГЎny",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 tartomГЎny",
    base64: "base64-kГіdolt string",
    base64url: "base64url-kГіdolt string",
    json_string: "JSON string",
    e164: "E.164 szГЎm",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "bemenet",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "szГЎm",
    array: "tГ¶mb",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `ГүrvГ©nytelen bemenet: a vГЎrt Г©rtГ©k instanceof ${issue.expected}, a kapott Г©rtГ©k ${received}`;
        }
        return `ГүrvГ©nytelen bemenet: a vГЎrt Г©rtГ©k ${expected}, a kapott Г©rtГ©k ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `ГүrvГ©nytelen bemenet: a vГЎrt Г©rtГ©k ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `ГүrvГ©nytelen opciГі: valamelyik Г©rtГ©k vГЎrt ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `TГәl nagy: ${issue.origin ?? "Г©rtГ©k"} mГ©rete tГәl nagy ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elem"}`;
        return `TГәl nagy: a bemeneti Г©rtГ©k ${issue.origin ?? "Г©rtГ©k"} tГәl nagy: ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `TГәl kicsi: a bemeneti Г©rtГ©k ${issue.origin} mГ©rete tГәl kicsi ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `TГәl kicsi: a bemeneti Г©rtГ©k ${issue.origin} tГәl kicsi ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `ГүrvГ©nytelen string: "${_issue.prefix}" Г©rtГ©kkel kell kezdЕ‘dnie`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `ГүrvГ©nytelen string: "${_issue.suffix}" Г©rtГ©kkel kell vГ©gzЕ‘dnie`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `ГүrvГ©nytelen string: "${_issue.includes}" Г©rtГ©ket kell tartalmaznia`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `ГүrvГ©nytelen string: ${_issue.pattern} mintГЎnak kell megfelelnie`;
        return `ГүrvГ©nytelen ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `ГүrvГ©nytelen szГЎm: ${issue.divisor} tГ¶bbszГ¶rГ¶sГ©nek kell lennie`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Ismeretlen kulcs${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `ГүrvГ©nytelen kulcs ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "ГүrvГ©nytelen bemenet";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `ГүrvГ©nytelen Г©rtГ©k: ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `ГүrvГ©nytelen bemenet`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\hy.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

function getArmenianPlural(count: number, one: string, many: string): string {
  return Math.abs(count) === 1 ? one : many;
}

function withDefiniteArticle(word: string | undefined): string {
  if (!word) return "";
  const vowels = ["ХЎ", "ХҘ", "ХЁ", "Х«", "Хё", "ХёЦӮ", "Ц…"];
  const lastChar = word[word.length - 1];
  return word + (vowels.includes(lastChar) ? "Х¶" : "ХЁ");
}

interface ArmenianSizable {
  unit: {
    one: string;
    many: string;
  };
  verb: string;
}

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, ArmenianSizable> = {
    string: {
      unit: {
        one: "Х¶Х·ХЎХ¶",
        many: "Х¶Х·ХЎХ¶Х¶ХҘЦҖ",
      },
      verb: "ХёЦӮХ¶ХҘХ¶ХЎХ¬",
    },
    file: {
      unit: {
        one: "ХўХЎХөХ©",
        many: "ХўХЎХөХ©ХҘЦҖ",
      },
      verb: "ХёЦӮХ¶ХҘХ¶ХЎХ¬",
    },
    array: {
      unit: {
        one: "ХҝХЎЦҖЦҖ",
        many: "ХҝХЎЦҖЦҖХҘЦҖ",
      },
      verb: "ХёЦӮХ¶ХҘХ¶ХЎХ¬",
    },
    set: {
      unit: {
        one: "ХҝХЎЦҖЦҖ",
        many: "ХҝХЎЦҖЦҖХҘЦҖ",
      },
      verb: "ХёЦӮХ¶ХҘХ¶ХЎХ¬",
    },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): ArmenianSizable | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "ХҙХёЦӮХҝЦ„",
    email: "Х§Х¬. Х°ХЎХҪЦҒХҘ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "Х§ХҙХёХ»Х«",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO ХЎХҙХҪХЎХ©Х«Хҫ ЦҮ ХӘХЎХҙ",
    date: "ISO ХЎХҙХҪХЎХ©Х«Хҫ",
    time: "ISO ХӘХЎХҙ",
    duration: "ISO ХҝЦҮХёХІХёЦӮХ©ХөХёЦӮХ¶",
    ipv4: "IPv4 Х°ХЎХҪЦҒХҘ",
    ipv6: "IPv6 Х°ХЎХҪЦҒХҘ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 ХҙХ«Х»ХЎХҜХЎХөЦ„",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 ХҙХ«Х»ХЎХҜХЎХөЦ„",
    base64: "base64 ХұЦҮХЎХ№ХЎЦғХёХҫ ХҝХёХІ",
    base64url: "base64url ХұЦҮХЎХ№ХЎЦғХёХҫ ХҝХёХІ",
    json_string: "JSON ХҝХёХІ",
    e164: "E.164 Х°ХЎХҙХЎЦҖ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "ХҙХёЦӮХҝЦ„",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "Х©Х«Хҫ",
    array: "ХҰХЎХ¶ХЈХҫХЎХ®",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҙХёЦӮХҝЦ„ХЎХЈЦҖХёЦӮХҙвҖӨ ХҪХәХЎХҪХҫХёЦӮХҙ Х§ЦҖ instanceof ${issue.expected}, ХҪХҝХЎЦҒХҫХҘХ¬ Х§ ${received}`;
        }
        return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҙХёЦӮХҝЦ„ХЎХЈЦҖХёЦӮХҙвҖӨ ХҪХәХЎХҪХҫХёЦӮХҙ Х§ЦҖ ${expected}, ХҪХҝХЎЦҒХҫХҘХ¬ Х§ ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҙХёЦӮХҝЦ„ХЎХЈЦҖХёЦӮХҙвҖӨ ХҪХәХЎХҪХҫХёЦӮХҙ Х§ЦҖ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[1])}`;
        return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҝХЎЦҖХўХҘЦҖХЎХҜвҖӨ ХҪХәХЎХҪХҫХёЦӮХҙ Х§ЦҖ Х°ХҘХҝЦҮХөХЎХ¬Х¶ХҘЦҖХ«ЦҒ ХҙХҘХҜХЁХқ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          const maxValue = Number(issue.maximum);
          const unit = getArmenianPlural(maxValue, sizing.unit.one, sizing.unit.many);
          return `ХүХЎЦғХЎХҰХЎХ¶ЦҒ ХҙХҘХ® ХЎЦҖХӘХҘЦ„вҖӨ ХҪХәХЎХҪХҫХёЦӮХҙ Х§, ХёЦҖ ${withDefiniteArticle(issue.origin ?? "ХЎЦҖХӘХҘЦ„")} ХҜХёЦӮХ¶ХҘХ¶ХЎ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${unit}`;
        }
        return `ХүХЎЦғХЎХҰХЎХ¶ЦҒ ХҙХҘХ® ХЎЦҖХӘХҘЦ„вҖӨ ХҪХәХЎХҪХҫХёЦӮХҙ Х§, ХёЦҖ ${withDefiniteArticle(issue.origin ?? "ХЎЦҖХӘХҘЦ„")} Х¬Х«Х¶Х« ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          const minValue = Number(issue.minimum);
          const unit = getArmenianPlural(minValue, sizing.unit.one, sizing.unit.many);
          return `ХүХЎЦғХЎХҰХЎХ¶ЦҒ ЦғХёЦ„ЦҖ ХЎЦҖХӘХҘЦ„вҖӨ ХҪХәХЎХҪХҫХёЦӮХҙ Х§, ХёЦҖ ${withDefiniteArticle(issue.origin)} ХҜХёЦӮХ¶ХҘХ¶ХЎ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${unit}`;
        }
        return `ХүХЎЦғХЎХҰХЎХ¶ЦҒ ЦғХёЦ„ЦҖ ХЎЦҖХӘХҘЦ„вҖӨ ХҪХәХЎХҪХҫХёЦӮХҙ Х§, ХёЦҖ ${withDefiniteArticle(issue.origin)} Х¬Х«Х¶Х« ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҝХёХІвҖӨ ХәХҘХҝЦ„ Х§ ХҪХҜХҪХҫХ« "${_issue.prefix}"-ХёХҫ`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҝХёХІвҖӨ ХәХҘХҝЦ„ Х§ ХЎХҫХЎЦҖХҝХҫХ« "${_issue.suffix}"-ХёХҫ`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҝХёХІвҖӨ ХәХҘХҝЦ„ Х§ ХәХЎЦҖХёЦӮХ¶ХЎХҜХ« "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҝХёХІвҖӨ ХәХҘХҝЦ„ Х§ Х°ХЎХҙХЎХәХЎХҝХЎХҪХӯХЎХ¶Х« ${_issue.pattern} ХұЦҮХЎХ№ХЎЦғХ«Х¶`;
        return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ Х©Х«ХҫвҖӨ ХәХҘХҝЦ„ Х§ ХўХЎХҰХҙХЎХәХЎХҝХ«ХҜ Х¬Х«Х¶Х« ${issue.divisor}-Х«`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `ХүХіХЎХ¶ХЎХ№ХҫХЎХ® ХўХЎХ¶ХЎХ¬Х«${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Х¶ХҘЦҖ" : ""}. ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХўХЎХ¶ХЎХ¬Х« ${withDefiniteArticle(issue.origin)}-ХёЦӮХҙ`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҙХёЦӮХҝЦ„ХЎХЈЦҖХёЦӮХҙ";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХЎЦҖХӘХҘЦ„ ${withDefiniteArticle(issue.origin)}-ХёЦӮХҙ`;
      default:
        return `ХҚХӯХЎХ¬ ХҙХёЦӮХҝЦ„ХЎХЈЦҖХёЦӮХҙ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\id.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "karakter", verb: "memiliki" },
    file: { unit: "byte", verb: "memiliki" },
    array: { unit: "item", verb: "memiliki" },
    set: { unit: "item", verb: "memiliki" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "input",
    email: "alamat email",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "tanggal dan waktu format ISO",
    date: "tanggal format ISO",
    time: "jam format ISO",
    duration: "durasi format ISO",
    ipv4: "alamat IPv4",
    ipv6: "alamat IPv6",
    cidrv4: "rentang alamat IPv4",
    cidrv6: "rentang alamat IPv6",
    base64: "string dengan enkode base64",
    base64url: "string dengan enkode base64url",
    json_string: "string JSON",
    e164: "angka E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "input",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Input tidak valid: diharapkan instanceof ${issue.expected}, diterima ${received}`;
        }
        return `Input tidak valid: diharapkan ${expected}, diterima ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `Input tidak valid: diharapkan ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Pilihan tidak valid: diharapkan salah satu dari ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Terlalu besar: diharapkan ${issue.origin ?? "value"} memiliki ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elemen"}`;
        return `Terlalu besar: diharapkan ${issue.origin ?? "value"} menjadi ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Terlalu kecil: diharapkan ${issue.origin} memiliki ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Terlalu kecil: diharapkan ${issue.origin} menjadi ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `String tidak valid: harus dimulai dengan "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `String tidak valid: harus berakhir dengan "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `String tidak valid: harus menyertakan "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `String tidak valid: harus sesuai pola ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format} tidak valid`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Angka tidak valid: harus kelipatan dari ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Kunci tidak dikenali ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Kunci tidak valid di ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Input tidak valid";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Nilai tidak valid di ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Input tidak valid`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\index.ts" =====

===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\is.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "stafi", verb: "aГ° hafa" },
    file: { unit: "bГҰti", verb: "aГ° hafa" },
    array: { unit: "hluti", verb: "aГ° hafa" },
    set: { unit: "hluti", verb: "aГ° hafa" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "gildi",
    email: "netfang",
    url: "vefslГіГ°",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO dagsetning og tГӯmi",
    date: "ISO dagsetning",
    time: "ISO tГӯmi",
    duration: "ISO tГӯmalengd",
    ipv4: "IPv4 address",
    ipv6: "IPv6 address",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 range",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 range",
    base64: "base64-encoded strengur",
    base64url: "base64url-encoded strengur",
    json_string: "JSON strengur",
    e164: "E.164 tГ¶lugildi",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "gildi",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "nГәmer",
    array: "fylki",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Rangt gildi: ГһГә slГіst inn ${received} Гҫar sem ГЎ aГ° vera instanceof ${issue.expected}`;
        }
        return `Rangt gildi: ГһГә slГіst inn ${received} Гҫar sem ГЎ aГ° vera ${expected}`;
      }

      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Rangt gildi: gert rГЎГ° fyrir ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Г“gilt val: mГЎ vera eitt af eftirfarandi ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Of stГіrt: gert er rГЎГ° fyrir aГ° ${issue.origin ?? "gildi"} hafi ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "hluti"}`;
        return `Of stГіrt: gert er rГЎГ° fyrir aГ° ${issue.origin ?? "gildi"} sГ© ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Of lГӯtiГ°: gert er rГЎГ° fyrir aГ° ${issue.origin} hafi ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Of lГӯtiГ°: gert er rГЎГ° fyrir aГ° ${issue.origin} sГ© ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `Г“gildur strengur: verГ°ur aГ° byrja ГЎ "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Г“gildur strengur: verГ°ur aГ° enda ГЎ "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Г“gildur strengur: verГ°ur aГ° innihalda "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Г“gildur strengur: verГ°ur aГ° fylgja mynstri ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Rangt ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `RГ¶ng tala: verГ°ur aГ° vera margfeldi af ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Г“Гҫekkt ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "ir lyklar" : "ur lykill"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Rangur lykill Гӯ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Rangt gildi";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Rangt gildi Гӯ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Rangt gildi`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\it.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "caratteri", verb: "avere" },
    file: { unit: "byte", verb: "avere" },
    array: { unit: "elementi", verb: "avere" },
    set: { unit: "elementi", verb: "avere" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "input",
    email: "indirizzo email",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "data e ora ISO",
    date: "data ISO",
    time: "ora ISO",
    duration: "durata ISO",
    ipv4: "indirizzo IPv4",
    ipv6: "indirizzo IPv6",
    cidrv4: "intervallo IPv4",
    cidrv6: "intervallo IPv6",
    base64: "stringa codificata in base64",
    base64url: "URL codificata in base64",
    json_string: "stringa JSON",
    e164: "numero E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "input",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "numero",
    array: "vettore",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Input non valido: atteso instanceof ${issue.expected}, ricevuto ${received}`;
        }
        return `Input non valido: atteso ${expected}, ricevuto ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Input non valido: atteso ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Opzione non valida: atteso uno tra ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Troppo grande: ${issue.origin ?? "valore"} deve avere ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementi"}`;
        return `Troppo grande: ${issue.origin ?? "valore"} deve essere ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Troppo piccolo: ${issue.origin} deve avere ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Troppo piccolo: ${issue.origin} deve essere ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `Stringa non valida: deve iniziare con "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Stringa non valida: deve terminare con "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Stringa non valida: deve includere "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Stringa non valida: deve corrispondere al pattern ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Invalid ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Numero non valido: deve essere un multiplo di ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Chiav${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "i" : "e"} non riconosciut${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "e" : "a"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Chiave non valida in ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Input non valido";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Valore non valido in ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Input non valido`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ja.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "ж–Үеӯ—", verb: "гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢ" },
    file: { unit: "гғҗгӮӨгғҲ", verb: "гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢ" },
    array: { unit: "иҰҒзҙ ", verb: "гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢ" },
    set: { unit: "иҰҒзҙ ", verb: "гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "е…ҘеҠӣеҖӨ",
    email: "гғЎгғјгғ«гӮўгғүгғ¬гӮ№",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "зөөж–Үеӯ—",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISOж—ҘжҷӮ",
    date: "ISOж—Ҙд»ҳ",
    time: "ISOжҷӮеҲ»",
    duration: "ISOжңҹй–“",
    ipv4: "IPv4гӮўгғүгғ¬гӮ№",
    ipv6: "IPv6гӮўгғүгғ¬гӮ№",
    cidrv4: "IPv4зҜ„еӣІ",
    cidrv6: "IPv6зҜ„еӣІ",
    base64: "base64гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғүж–Үеӯ—еҲ—",
    base64url: "base64urlгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғүж–Үеӯ—еҲ—",
    json_string: "JSONж–Үеӯ—еҲ—",
    e164: "E.164з•ӘеҸ·",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "е…ҘеҠӣеҖӨ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "ж•°еҖӨ",
    array: "й…ҚеҲ—",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘе…ҘеҠӣ: instanceof ${issue.expected}гҒҢжңҹеҫ…гҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҖҒ${received}гҒҢе…ҘеҠӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹ`;
        }
        return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘе…ҘеҠӣ: ${expected}гҒҢжңҹеҫ…гҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҖҒ${received}гҒҢе…ҘеҠӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹ`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘе…ҘеҠӣ: ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}гҒҢжңҹеҫ…гҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹ`;
        return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘйҒёжҠһ: ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "гҖҒ")}гҒ®гҒ„гҒҡгӮҢгҒӢгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "д»ҘдёӢгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢ" : "гӮҲгӮҠе°ҸгҒ•гҒ„";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `еӨ§гҒҚгҒҷгҒҺгӮӢеҖӨ: ${issue.origin ?? "еҖӨ"}гҒҜ${issue.maximum.toString()}${sizing.unit ?? "иҰҒзҙ "}${adj}еҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
        return `еӨ§гҒҚгҒҷгҒҺгӮӢеҖӨ: ${issue.origin ?? "еҖӨ"}гҒҜ${issue.maximum.toString()}${adj}еҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "д»ҘдёҠгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢ" : "гӮҲгӮҠеӨ§гҒҚгҒ„";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `е°ҸгҒ•гҒҷгҒҺгӮӢеҖӨ: ${issue.origin}гҒҜ${issue.minimum.toString()}${sizing.unit}${adj}еҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
        return `е°ҸгҒ•гҒҷгҒҺгӮӢеҖӨ: ${issue.origin}гҒҜ${issue.minimum.toString()}${adj}еҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж–Үеӯ—еҲ—: "${_issue.prefix}"гҒ§е§ӢгҒҫгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж–Үеӯ—еҲ—: "${_issue.suffix}"гҒ§зөӮгӮҸгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж–Үеӯ—еҲ—: "${_issue.includes}"гӮ’еҗ«гӮҖеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж–Үеӯ—еҲ—: гғ‘гӮҝгғјгғі${_issue.pattern}гҒ«дёҖиҮҙгҒҷгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
        return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж•°еҖӨ: ${issue.divisor}гҒ®еҖҚж•°гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `иӘҚиӯҳгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒӘгҒ„гӮӯгғј${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "зҫӨ" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, "гҖҒ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `${issue.origin}еҶ…гҒ®з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘгӮӯгғј`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘе…ҘеҠӣ";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `${issue.origin}еҶ…гҒ®з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘеҖӨ`;
      default:
        return `з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘе…ҘеҠӣ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ka.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "бғЎбғҳбғӣбғ‘бғқбғҡбғқ", verb: "бғЈбғңбғ“бғҗ бғЁбғ”бғҳбғӘбғҗбғ•бғ“бғ”бғЎ" },
    file: { unit: "бғ‘бғҗбғҳбғўбғҳ", verb: "бғЈбғңбғ“бғҗ бғЁбғ”бғҳбғӘбғҗбғ•бғ“бғ”бғЎ" },
    array: { unit: "бғ”бғҡбғ”бғӣбғ”бғңбғўбғҳ", verb: "бғЈбғңбғ“бғҗ бғЁбғ”бғҳбғӘбғҗбғ•бғ“бғ”бғЎ" },
    set: { unit: "бғ”бғҡбғ”бғӣбғ”бғңбғўбғҳ", verb: "бғЈбғңбғ“бғҗ бғЁбғ”бғҳбғӘбғҗбғ•бғ“бғ”бғЎ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "бғЁбғ”бғ§бғ•бғҗбғңбғҗ",
    email: "бғ”бғҡ-бғӨбғқбғЎбғўбғҳбғЎ бғӣбғҳбғЎбғҗбғӣбғҗбғ бғ—бғҳ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "бғ”бғӣбғқбғҜбғҳ",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "бғ—бғҗбғ бғҳбғҰбғҳ-бғ“бғ бғқ",
    date: "бғ—бғҗбғ бғҳбғҰбғҳ",
    time: "бғ“бғ бғқ",
    duration: "бғ®бғҗбғңбғ’бғ бғ«бғҡбғҳбғ•бғқбғ‘бғҗ",
    ipv4: "IPv4 бғӣбғҳбғЎбғҗбғӣбғҗбғ бғ—бғҳ",
    ipv6: "IPv6 бғӣбғҳбғЎбғҗбғӣбғҗбғ бғ—бғҳ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 бғ“бғҳбғҗбғһбғҗбғ–бғқбғңбғҳ",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 бғ“бғҳбғҗбғһбғҗбғ–бғқбғңбғҳ",
    base64: "base64-бғҷбғқбғ“бғҳбғ бғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳ бғЎбғўбғ бғҳбғңбғ’бғҳ",
    base64url: "base64url-бғҷбғқбғ“бғҳбғ бғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳ бғЎбғўбғ бғҳбғңбғ’бғҳ",
    json_string: "JSON бғЎбғўбғ бғҳбғңбғ’бғҳ",
    e164: "E.164 бғңбғқбғӣбғ”бғ бғҳ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "бғЁбғ”бғ§бғ•бғҗбғңбғҗ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "бғ бғҳбғӘбғ®бғ•бғҳ",
    string: "бғЎбғўбғ бғҳбғңбғ’бғҳ",
    boolean: "бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғ”бғҗбғңбғҳ",
    function: "бғӨбғЈбғңбғҘбғӘбғҳбғҗ",
    array: "бғӣбғҗбғЎбғҳбғ•бғҳ",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғЁбғ”бғ§бғ•бғҗбғңбғҗ: бғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғҡбғқбғ“бғңбғ”бғҡбғҳ instanceof ${issue.expected}, бғӣбғҳбғҰбғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳ ${received}`;
        }
        return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғЁбғ”бғ§бғ•бғҗбғңбғҗ: бғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғҡбғқбғ“бғңбғ”бғҡбғҳ ${expected}, бғӣбғҳбғҰбғ”бғ‘бғЈбғҡбғҳ ${received}`;
      }

      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғЁбғ”бғ§бғ•бғҗбғңбғҗ: бғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғҡбғқбғ“бғңбғ”бғҡбғҳ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғ•бғҗбғ бғҳбғҗбғңбғўбғҳ: бғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғҡбғқбғ“бғңбғ”бғҡбғҳбғҗ бғ”бғ бғ—-бғ”бғ бғ—бғҳ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}-бғ“бғҗбғң`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `бғ–бғ”бғ“бғӣбғ”бғўбғҗбғ“ бғ“бғҳбғ“бғҳ: бғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғҡбғқбғ“бғңбғ”бғҡбғҳ ${issue.origin ?? "бғӣбғңбғҳбғЁбғ•бғңбғ”бғҡбғқбғ‘бғҗ"} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        return `бғ–бғ”бғ“бғӣбғ”бғўбғҗбғ“ бғ“бғҳбғ“бғҳ: бғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғҡбғқбғ“бғңбғ”бғҡбғҳ ${issue.origin ?? "бғӣбғңбғҳбғЁбғ•бғңбғ”бғҡбғқбғ‘бғҗ"} бғҳбғ§бғқбғЎ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `бғ–бғ”бғ“бғӣбғ”бғўбғҗбғ“ бғһбғҗбғўбғҗбғ бғҗ: бғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғҡбғқбғ“бғңбғ”бғҡбғҳ ${issue.origin} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `бғ–бғ”бғ“бғӣбғ”бғўбғҗбғ“ бғһбғҗбғўбғҗбғ бғҗ: бғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғҡбғқбғ“бғңбғ”бғҡбғҳ ${issue.origin} бғҳбғ§бғқбғЎ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғЎбғўбғ бғҳбғңбғ’бғҳ: бғЈбғңбғ“бғҗ бғҳбғ¬бғ§бғ”бғ‘бғқбғ“бғ”бғЎ "${_issue.prefix}"-бғҳбғ—`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғЎбғўбғ бғҳбғңбғ’бғҳ: бғЈбғңбғ“бғҗ бғӣбғ—бғҗбғ•бғ бғ“бғ”бғ‘бғқбғ“бғ”бғЎ "${_issue.suffix}"-бғҳбғ—`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғЎбғўбғ бғҳбғңбғ’бғҳ: бғЈбғңбғ“бғҗ бғЁбғ”бғҳбғӘбғҗбғ•бғ“бғ”бғЎ "${_issue.includes}"-бғЎ`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғЎбғўбғ бғҳбғңбғ’бғҳ: бғЈбғңбғ“бғҗ бғЁбғ”бғ”бғЎбғҗбғ‘бғҗбғӣбғ”бғ‘бғқбғ“бғ”бғЎ бғЁбғҗбғ‘бғҡбғқбғңбғЎ ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғ бғҳбғӘбғ®бғ•бғҳ: бғЈбғңбғ“бғҗ бғҳбғ§бғқбғЎ ${issue.divisor}-бғҳбғЎ бғҜбғ”бғ бғҗбғ“бғҳ`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `бғЈбғӘбғңбғқбғ‘бғҳ бғ’бғҗбғЎбғҗбғҰбғ”бғ‘${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "бғ”бғ‘бғҳ" : "бғҳ"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғ’бғҗбғЎбғҗбғҰбғ”бғ‘бғҳ ${issue.origin}-бғЁбғҳ`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғЁбғ”бғ§бғ•бғҗбғңбғҗ";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғӣбғңбғҳбғЁбғ•бғңбғ”бғҡбғқбғ‘бғҗ ${issue.origin}-бғЁбғҳ`;
      default:
        return `бғҗбғ бғҗбғЎбғ¬бғқбғ бғҳ бғЁбғ”бғ§бғ•бғҗбғңбғҗ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\kh.ts" =====  
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import km from "./km.js";

/** @deprecated Use `km` instead. */
export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return km();
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\km.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "бһҸбһҪбһўбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһҡ", verb: "бһӮбһҪбһҡбһҳбһ¶бһ“" },
    file: { unit: "бһ”бҹғ", verb: "бһӮбһҪбһҡбһҳбһ¶бһ“" },
    array: { unit: "бһ’бһ¶бһҸбһ»", verb: "бһӮбһҪбһҡбһҳбһ¶бһ“" },
    set: { unit: "бһ’бһ¶бһҸбһ»", verb: "бһӮбһҪбһҡбһҳбһ¶бһ“" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "бһ‘бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ“бһ“бҹҗбһҷбһ”бһүбҹ’бһ…бһјбһӣ",
    email: "бһўбһ¶бһҹбһҷбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ“бһўбҹҠбһёбһҳбҹӮбһӣ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "бһҹбһүбҹ’бһүбһ¶бһўбһ¶бһҡбһҳбҹ’бһҳбһҺбҹҚ",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "бһҖбһ¶бһӣбһ”бһҡбһ·бһ…бҹ’бһҶбҹҒбһ‘ бһ“бһ·бһ„бһҳбҹүбҹ„бһ„ ISO",
    date: "бһҖбһ¶бһӣбһ”бһҡбһ·бһ…бҹ’бһҶбҹҒбһ‘ ISO",
    time: "бһҳбҹүбҹ„бһ„ ISO",
    duration: "бһҡбһҷбҹҲбһ–бҹҒбһӣ ISO",
    ipv4: "бһўбһ¶бһҹбһҷбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ“ IPv4",
    ipv6: "бһўбһ¶бһҹбһҷбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ“ IPv6",
    cidrv4: "бһҠбҹӮбһ“бһўбһ¶бһҹбһҷбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ“ IPv4",
    cidrv6: "бһҠбҹӮбһ“бһўбһ¶бһҹбһҷбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ“ IPv6",
    base64: "бһҒбҹ’бһҹбҹӮбһўбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһҡбһўбҹҠбһ·бһҖбһјбһҠ base64",
    base64url: "бһҒбҹ’бһҹбҹӮбһўбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһҡбһўбҹҠбһ·бһҖбһјбһҠ base64url",
    json_string: "бһҒбҹ’бһҹбҹӮбһўбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһҡ JSON",
    e164: "бһӣбҹҒбһҒ E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "бһ‘бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ“бһ“бҹҗбһҷбһ”бһүбҹ’бһ…бһјбһӣ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "бһӣбҹҒбһҒ",
    array: "бһўбһ¶бһҡбҹҒ (Array)",
    null: "бһӮбҹ’бһҳбһ¶бһ“бһҸбһҳбҹ’бһӣбҹғ (null)",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `бһ‘бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ“бһ“бҹҗбһҷбһ”бһүбҹ’бһ…бһјбһӣбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҖбһ¶бһҡ instanceof ${issue.expected} бһ”бҹүбһ»бһ“бҹ’бһҸбҹӮбһ‘бһ‘бһҪбһӣбһ”бһ¶бһ“ ${received}`;
        }
        return `бһ‘бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ“бһ“бҹҗбһҷбһ”бһүбҹ’бһ…бһјбһӣбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҖбһ¶бһҡ ${expected} бһ”бҹүбһ»бһ“бҹ’бһҸбҹӮбһ‘бһ‘бһҪбһӣбһ”бһ¶бһ“ ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `бһ‘бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ“бһ“бҹҗбһҷбһ”бһүбҹ’бһ…бһјбһӣбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҖбһ¶бһҡ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `бһҮбһҳбҹ’бһҡбһҫбһҹбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҮбһ¶бһҳбһҪбһҷбһҖбҹ’бһ“бһ»бһ„бһ…бҹҶбһҺбҹ„бһҳ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `бһ’бҹҶбһ–бҹҒбһҖбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҖбһ¶бһҡ ${issue.origin ?? "бһҸбһҳбҹ’бһӣбҹғ"} ${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "бһ’бһ¶бһҸбһ»"}`;
        return `бһ’бҹҶбһ–бҹҒбһҖбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҖбһ¶бһҡ ${issue.origin ?? "бһҸбһҳбҹ’бһӣбҹғ"} ${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `бһҸбһјбһ…бһ–бҹҒбһҖбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҖбһ¶бһҡ ${issue.origin} ${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `бһҸбһјбһ…бһ–бҹҒбһҖбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҖбһ¶бһҡ ${issue.origin} ${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `бһҒбҹ’бһҹбҹӮбһўбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһҡбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһ…бһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһ•бҹ’бһҸбһҫбһҳбһҠбҹ„бһҷ "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `бһҒбҹ’бһҹбҹӮбһўбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһҡбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһ”бһүбҹ’бһ…бһ”бҹӢбһҠбҹ„бһҷ "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `бһҒбҹ’бһҹбҹӮбһўбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһҡбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҳбһ¶бһ“ "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `бһҒбҹ’бһҹбҹӮбһўбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһҡбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҸбҹӮбһ•бҹ’бһӮбһјбһ•бҹ’бһӮбһ„бһ“бһ№бһ„бһ‘бһҳбҹ’бһҡбһ„бҹӢбһҠбҹӮбһӣбһ”бһ¶бһ“бһҖбҹҶбһҺбһҸбҹӢ ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `бһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `бһӣбҹҒбһҒбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбҹ– бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһҸбҹӮбһҮбһ¶бһ–бһ бһ»бһӮбһ»бһҺбһ“бҹғ ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `бһҡбһҖбһғбһҫбһүбһҹбҹ„бһҳбһ·бһ“бһҹбҹ’бһӮбһ¶бһӣбҹӢбҹ– ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `бһҹбҹ„бһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһ“бҹ…бһҖбҹ’бһ“бһ»бһ„ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return `бһ‘бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ“бһ“бҹҗбһҷбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһң`;
      case "invalid_element":
        return `бһ‘бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ“бһ“бҹҗбһҷбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһ“бҹ…бһҖбҹ’бһ“бһ»бһ„ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `бһ‘бһ·бһ“бҹ’бһ“бһ“бҹҗбһҷбһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҳбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһң`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ko.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "л¬ёмһҗ", verb: "to have" },
    file: { unit: "л°”мқҙнҠё", verb: "to have" },
    array: { unit: "к°ң", verb: "to have" },
    set: { unit: "к°ң", verb: "to have" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "мһ…л Ҙ",
    email: "мқҙл©”мқј мЈјмҶҢ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "мқҙлӘЁм§Җ",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO лӮ м§ңмӢңк°„",
    date: "ISO лӮ м§ң",
    time: "ISO мӢңк°„",
    duration: "ISO кё°к°„",
    ipv4: "IPv4 мЈјмҶҢ",
    ipv6: "IPv6 мЈјмҶҢ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 лІ”мң„",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 лІ”мң„",
    base64: "base64 мқёмҪ”л”© л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ",
    base64url: "base64url мқёмҪ”л”© л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ",
    json_string: "JSON л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ",
    e164: "E.164 лІҲнҳё",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "мһ…л Ҙ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң мһ…л Ҙ: мҳҲмғҒ нғҖмһ…мқҖ instanceof ${issue.expected}, л°ӣмқҖ нғҖмһ…мқҖ ${received}мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ`;
        }
        return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң мһ…л Ҙ: мҳҲмғҒ нғҖмһ…мқҖ ${expected}, л°ӣмқҖ нғҖмһ…мқҖ ${received}мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң мһ…л Ҙ: к°’мқҖ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])} мқҙм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ`;
        return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң мҳөм…ҳ: ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "лҳҗлҠ” ")} мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳм—¬м•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "мқҙн•ҳ" : "лҜёл§Ң";
        const suffix = adj === "лҜёл§Ң" ? "мқҙм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ" : "м—¬м•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const unit = sizing?.unit ?? "мҡ”мҶҢ";
        if (sizing) return `${issue.origin ?? "к°’"}мқҙ л„Ҳл¬ҙ нҒҪлӢҲлӢӨ: ${issue.maximum.toString()}${unit} ${adj}${suffix}`;

        return `${issue.origin ?? "к°’"}мқҙ л„Ҳл¬ҙ нҒҪлӢҲлӢӨ: ${issue.maximum.toString()} ${adj}${suffix}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "мқҙмғҒ" : "мҙҲкіј";
        const suffix = adj === "мқҙмғҒ" ? "мқҙм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ" : "м—¬м•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const unit = sizing?.unit ?? "мҡ”мҶҢ";
        if (sizing) {
          return `${issue.origin ?? "к°’"}мқҙ л„Ҳл¬ҙ мһ‘мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ: ${issue.minimum.toString()}${unit} ${adj}${suffix}`;
        }

        return `${issue.origin ?? "к°’"}мқҙ л„Ҳл¬ҙ мһ‘мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ: ${issue.minimum.toString()} ${adj}${suffix}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ: "${_issue.prefix}"(мңј)лЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ: "${_issue.suffix}"(мңј)лЎң лҒқлӮҳм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ: "${_issue.includes}"мқ„(лҘј) нҸ¬н•Ён•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ: м •к·ңмӢқ ${_issue.pattern} нҢЁн„ҙкіј мқјм№ҳн•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ`;
        return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң мҲ«мһҗ: ${issue.divisor}мқҳ л°°мҲҳм—¬м•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `мқёмӢқн•  мҲҳ м—ҶлҠ” нӮӨ: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң нӮӨ: ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң мһ…л Ҙ`;
      case "invalid_element":
        return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң к°’: ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `мһҳлӘ»лҗң мһ…л Ҙ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\lt.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const capitalizeFirstCharacter = (text: string): string => {
  return text.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + text.slice(1);
};

type UnitType = "one" | "few" | "many";
type SizeableComparisonType = "smaller" | "bigger";

function getUnitTypeFromNumber(number: number): UnitType {
  const abs = Math.abs(number);
  const last = abs % 10;
  const last2 = abs % 100;

  if ((last2 >= 11 && last2 <= 19) || last === 0) return "many";
  if (last === 1) return "one";
  return "few";
}

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<
    string,
    {
      unit: Record<UnitType, string>;
      verb: Record<SizeableComparisonType, { inclusive: string; notInclusive: string }>;
    }
  > = {
    string: {
      unit: {
        one: "simbolis",
        few: "simboliai",
        many: "simboliЕі",
      },
      verb: {
        smaller: {
          inclusive: "turi bЕ«ti ne ilgesnД— kaip",
          notInclusive: "turi bЕ«ti trumpesnД— kaip",
        },
        bigger: {
          inclusive: "turi bЕ«ti ne trumpesnД— kaip",
          notInclusive: "turi bЕ«ti ilgesnД— kaip",
        },
      },
    },
    file: {
      unit: {
        one: "baitas",
        few: "baitai",
        many: "baitЕі",
      },
      verb: {
        smaller: {
          inclusive: "turi bЕ«ti ne didesnis kaip",
          notInclusive: "turi bЕ«ti maЕҫesnis kaip",
        },
        bigger: {
          inclusive: "turi bЕ«ti ne maЕҫesnis kaip",
          notInclusive: "turi bЕ«ti didesnis kaip",
        },
      },
    },
    array: {
      unit: {
        one: "elementД…",
        few: "elementus",
        many: "elementЕі",
      },
      verb: {
        smaller: {
          inclusive: "turi turД—ti ne daugiau kaip",
          notInclusive: "turi turД—ti maЕҫiau kaip",
        },
        bigger: {
          inclusive: "turi turД—ti ne maЕҫiau kaip",
          notInclusive: "turi turД—ti daugiau kaip",
        },
      },
    },
    set: {
      unit: {
        one: "elementД…",
        few: "elementus",
        many: "elementЕі",
      },
      verb: {
        smaller: {
          inclusive: "turi turД—ti ne daugiau kaip",
          notInclusive: "turi turД—ti maЕҫiau kaip",
        },
        bigger: {
          inclusive: "turi turД—ti ne maЕҫiau kaip",
          notInclusive: "turi turД—ti daugiau kaip",
        },
      },
    },
  };

  function getSizing(
    origin: string,
    unitType: UnitType,
    inclusive: boolean,
    targetShouldBe: SizeableComparisonType
  ): {
    unit: string;
    verb: string;
  } | null {
    const result = Sizable[origin] ?? null;
    if (result === null) return result;

    return {
      unit: result.unit[unitType],
      verb: result.verb[targetShouldBe][inclusive ? "inclusive" : "notInclusive"],
    };
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "ДҜvestis",
    email: "el. paЕЎto adresas",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "jaustukas",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO data ir laikas",
    date: "ISO data",
    time: "ISO laikas",
    duration: "ISO trukmД—",
    ipv4: "IPv4 adresas",
    ipv6: "IPv6 adresas",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 tinklo prefiksas (CIDR)",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 tinklo prefiksas (CIDR)",
    base64: "base64 uЕҫkoduota eilutД—",
    base64url: "base64url uЕҫkoduota eilutД—",
    json_string: "JSON eilutД—",
    e164: "E.164 numeris",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "ДҜvestis",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "skaiДҚius",
    bigint: "sveikasis skaiДҚius",
    string: "eilutД—",
    boolean: "loginД— reikЕЎmД—",
    undefined: "neapibrД—Еҫta reikЕЎmД—",
    function: "funkcija",
    symbol: "simbolis",
    array: "masyvas",
    object: "objektas",
    null: "nulinД— reikЕЎmД—",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Gautas tipas ${received}, o tikД—tasi - instanceof ${issue.expected}`;
        }
        return `Gautas tipas ${received}, o tikД—tasi - ${expected}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Privalo bЕ«ti ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Privalo bЕ«ti vienas iЕЎ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")} pasirinkimЕі`;
      case "too_big": {
        const origin = TypeDictionary[issue.origin] ?? issue.origin;
        const sizing = getSizing(
          issue.origin,
          getUnitTypeFromNumber(Number(issue.maximum)),
          issue.inclusive ?? false,
          "smaller"
        );
        if (sizing?.verb)
          return `${capitalizeFirstCharacter(origin ?? issue.origin ?? "reikЕЎmД—")} ${sizing.verb} ${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementЕі"}`;
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "ne didesnis kaip" : "maЕҫesnis kaip";
        return `${capitalizeFirstCharacter(origin ?? issue.origin ?? "reikЕЎmД—")} turi bЕ«ti ${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing?.unit}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const origin = TypeDictionary[issue.origin] ?? issue.origin;
        const sizing = getSizing(
          issue.origin,
          getUnitTypeFromNumber(Number(issue.minimum)),
          issue.inclusive ?? false,
          "bigger"
        );
        if (sizing?.verb)
          return `${capitalizeFirstCharacter(origin ?? issue.origin ?? "reikЕЎmД—")} ${sizing.verb} ${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementЕі"}`;
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "ne maЕҫesnis kaip" : "didesnis kaip";
        return `${capitalizeFirstCharacter(origin ?? issue.origin ?? "reikЕЎmД—")} turi bЕ«ti ${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing?.unit}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `EilutД— privalo prasidД—ti "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `EilutД— privalo pasibaigti "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `EilutД— privalo ДҜtraukti "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `EilutД— privalo atitikti ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Neteisingas ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `SkaiДҚius privalo bЕ«ti ${issue.divisor} kartotinis.`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `NeatpaЕҫint${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "i" : "as"} rakt${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "ai" : "as"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return "Rastas klaidingas raktas";
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Klaidinga ДҜvestis";
      case "invalid_element": {
        const origin = TypeDictionary[issue.origin] ?? issue.origin;
        return `${capitalizeFirstCharacter(origin ?? issue.origin ?? "reikЕЎmД—")} turi klaidingД… ДҜvestДҜ`;
      }
      default:
        return "Klaidinga ДҜvestis";
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\mk.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "Р·РҪР°СҶРё", verb: "РҙР° РёРјР°Р°СӮ" },
    file: { unit: "РұР°СҳСӮРё", verb: "РҙР° РёРјР°Р°СӮ" },
    array: { unit: "СҒСӮР°РІРәРё", verb: "РҙР° РёРјР°Р°СӮ" },
    set: { unit: "СҒСӮР°РІРәРё", verb: "РҙР° РёРјР°Р°СӮ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "РІРҪРөСҒ",
    email: "Р°РҙСҖРөСҒР° РҪР° Рө-РҝРҫСҲСӮР°",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "РөРјРҫСҹРё",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO РҙР°СӮСғРј Рё РІСҖРөРјРө",
    date: "ISO РҙР°СӮСғРј",
    time: "ISO РІСҖРөРјРө",
    duration: "ISO РІСҖРөРјРөСӮСҖР°РөСҡРө",
    ipv4: "IPv4 Р°РҙСҖРөСҒР°",
    ipv6: "IPv6 Р°РҙСҖРөСҒР°",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 РҫРҝСҒРөРі",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 РҫРҝСҒРөРі",
    base64: "base64-РөРҪРәРҫРҙРёСҖР°РҪР° РҪРёР·Р°",
    base64url: "base64url-РөРҪРәРҫРҙРёСҖР°РҪР° РҪРёР·Р°",
    json_string: "JSON РҪРёР·Р°",
    e164: "E.164 РұСҖРҫСҳ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "РІРҪРөСҒ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "РұСҖРҫСҳ",
    array: "РҪРёР·Р°",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Р“СҖРөСҲРөРҪ РІРҪРөСҒ: СҒРө РҫСҮРөРәСғРІР° instanceof ${issue.expected}, РҝСҖРёРјРөРҪРҫ ${received}`;
        }
        return `Р“СҖРөСҲРөРҪ РІРҪРөСҒ: СҒРө РҫСҮРөРәСғРІР° ${expected}, РҝСҖРёРјРөРҪРҫ ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Invalid input: expected ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Р“СҖРөСҲР°РҪР° РҫРҝСҶРёСҳР°: СҒРө РҫСҮРөРәСғРІР° РөРҙРҪР° ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `РҹСҖРөРјРҪРҫРіСғ РіРҫР»РөРј: СҒРө РҫСҮРөРәСғРІР° ${issue.origin ?? "РІСҖРөРҙРҪРҫСҒСӮР°"} РҙР° РёРјР° ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "РөР»РөРјРөРҪСӮРё"}`;
        return `РҹСҖРөРјРҪРҫРіСғ РіРҫР»РөРј: СҒРө РҫСҮРөРәСғРІР° ${issue.origin ?? "РІСҖРөРҙРҪРҫСҒСӮР°"} РҙР° РұРёРҙРө ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `РҹСҖРөРјРҪРҫРіСғ РјР°Р»: СҒРө РҫСҮРөРәСғРІР° ${issue.origin} РҙР° РёРјР° ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `РҹСҖРөРјРҪРҫРіСғ РјР°Р»: СҒРө РҫСҮРөРәСғРІР° ${issue.origin} РҙР° РұРёРҙРө ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `РқРөРІР°Р¶РөСҮРәР° РҪРёР·Р°: РјРҫСҖР° РҙР° Р·Р°РҝРҫСҮРҪСғРІР° СҒРҫ "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `РқРөРІР°Р¶РөСҮРәР° РҪРёР·Р°: РјРҫСҖР° РҙР° Р·Р°РІСҖСҲСғРІР° СҒРҫ "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `РқРөРІР°Р¶РөСҮРәР° РҪРёР·Р°: РјРҫСҖР° РҙР° РІРәР»СғСҮСғРІР° "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `РқРөРІР°Р¶РөСҮРәР° РҪРёР·Р°: РјРҫСҖР° РҙР° РҫРҙРіРҫР°СҖР° РҪР° РҝР°СӮРөСҖРҪРҫСӮ ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Invalid ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Р“СҖРөСҲРөРҪ РұСҖРҫСҳ: РјРҫСҖР° РҙР° РұРёРҙРө РҙРөР»РёРІ СҒРҫ ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "РқРөРҝСҖРөРҝРҫР·РҪР°РөРҪРё РәР»СғСҮРөРІРё" : "РқРөРҝСҖРөРҝРҫР·РҪР°РөРҪ РәР»СғСҮ"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Р“СҖРөСҲРөРҪ РәР»СғСҮ РІРҫ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Р“СҖРөСҲРөРҪ РІРҪРөСҒ";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Р“СҖРөСҲРҪР° РІСҖРөРҙРҪРҫСҒСӮ РІРҫ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Р“СҖРөСҲРөРҪ РІРҪРөСҒ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ms.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "aksara", verb: "mempunyai" },
    file: { unit: "bait", verb: "mempunyai" },
    array: { unit: "elemen", verb: "mempunyai" },
    set: { unit: "elemen", verb: "mempunyai" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "input",
    email: "alamat e-mel",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "tarikh masa ISO",
    date: "tarikh ISO",
    time: "masa ISO",
    duration: "tempoh ISO",
    ipv4: "alamat IPv4",
    ipv6: "alamat IPv6",
    cidrv4: "julat IPv4",
    cidrv6: "julat IPv6",
    base64: "string dikodkan base64",
    base64url: "string dikodkan base64url",
    json_string: "string JSON",
    e164: "nombor E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "input",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "nombor",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Input tidak sah: dijangka instanceof ${issue.expected}, diterima ${received}`;
        }
        return `Input tidak sah: dijangka ${expected}, diterima ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Input tidak sah: dijangka ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Pilihan tidak sah: dijangka salah satu daripada ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Terlalu besar: dijangka ${issue.origin ?? "nilai"} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elemen"}`;
        return `Terlalu besar: dijangka ${issue.origin ?? "nilai"} adalah ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Terlalu kecil: dijangka ${issue.origin} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Terlalu kecil: dijangka ${issue.origin} adalah ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `String tidak sah: mesti bermula dengan "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `String tidak sah: mesti berakhir dengan "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `String tidak sah: mesti mengandungi "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `String tidak sah: mesti sepadan dengan corak ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format} tidak sah`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Nombor tidak sah: perlu gandaan ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Kunci tidak dikenali: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Kunci tidak sah dalam ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Input tidak sah";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Nilai tidak sah dalam ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Input tidak sah`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\nl.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "tekens", verb: "heeft" },
    file: { unit: "bytes", verb: "heeft" },
    array: { unit: "elementen", verb: "heeft" },
    set: { unit: "elementen", verb: "heeft" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "invoer",
    email: "emailadres",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO datum en tijd",
    date: "ISO datum",
    time: "ISO tijd",
    duration: "ISO duur",
    ipv4: "IPv4-adres",
    ipv6: "IPv6-adres",
    cidrv4: "IPv4-bereik",
    cidrv6: "IPv6-bereik",
    base64: "base64-gecodeerde tekst",
    base64url: "base64 URL-gecodeerde tekst",
    json_string: "JSON string",
    e164: "E.164-nummer",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "invoer",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "getal",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Ongeldige invoer: verwacht instanceof ${issue.expected}, ontving ${received}`;
        }
        return `Ongeldige invoer: verwacht ${expected}, ontving ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Ongeldige invoer: verwacht ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Ongeldige optie: verwacht Г©Г©n van ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const longName = issue.origin === "date" ? "laat" : issue.origin === "string" ? "lang" : "groot";

        if (sizing)
          return `Te ${longName}: verwacht dat ${issue.origin ?? "waarde"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementen"} ${sizing.verb}`;
        return `Te ${longName}: verwacht dat ${issue.origin ?? "waarde"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} is`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        const shortName = issue.origin === "date" ? "vroeg" : issue.origin === "string" ? "kort" : "klein";

        if (sizing) {
          return `Te ${shortName}: verwacht dat ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit} ${sizing.verb}`;
        }

        return `Te ${shortName}: verwacht dat ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} is`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `Ongeldige tekst: moet met "${_issue.prefix}" beginnen`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Ongeldige tekst: moet op "${_issue.suffix}" eindigen`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Ongeldige tekst: moet "${_issue.includes}" bevatten`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Ongeldige tekst: moet overeenkomen met patroon ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Ongeldig: ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Ongeldig getal: moet een veelvoud van ${issue.divisor} zijn`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Onbekende key${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Ongeldige key in ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Ongeldige invoer";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Ongeldige waarde in ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Ongeldige invoer`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\no.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "tegn", verb: "ГҘ ha" },
    file: { unit: "bytes", verb: "ГҘ ha" },
    array: { unit: "elementer", verb: "ГҘ inneholde" },
    set: { unit: "elementer", verb: "ГҘ inneholde" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "input",
    email: "e-postadresse",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO dato- og klokkeslett",
    date: "ISO-dato",
    time: "ISO-klokkeslett",
    duration: "ISO-varighet",
    ipv4: "IPv4-omrГҘde",
    ipv6: "IPv6-omrГҘde",
    cidrv4: "IPv4-spekter",
    cidrv6: "IPv6-spekter",
    base64: "base64-enkodet streng",
    base64url: "base64url-enkodet streng",
    json_string: "JSON-streng",
    e164: "E.164-nummer",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "input",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "tall",
    array: "liste",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Ugyldig input: forventet instanceof ${issue.expected}, fikk ${received}`;
        }
        return `Ugyldig input: forventet ${expected}, fikk ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Ugyldig verdi: forventet ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Ugyldig valg: forventet en av ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `For stor(t): forventet ${issue.origin ?? "value"} til ГҘ ha ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementer"}`;
        return `For stor(t): forventet ${issue.origin ?? "value"} til ГҘ ha ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `For lite(n): forventet ${issue.origin} til ГҘ ha ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `For lite(n): forventet ${issue.origin} til ГҘ ha ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `Ugyldig streng: mГҘ starte med "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Ugyldig streng: mГҘ ende med "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Ugyldig streng: mГҘ inneholde "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Ugyldig streng: mГҘ matche mГёnsteret ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Ugyldig ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Ugyldig tall: mГҘ vГҰre et multiplum av ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Ukjente nГёkler" : "Ukjent nГёkkel"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Ugyldig nГёkkel i ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Ugyldig input";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Ugyldig verdi i ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Ugyldig input`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ota.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "harf", verb: "olmalДұdДұr" },
    file: { unit: "bayt", verb: "olmalДұdДұr" },
    array: { unit: "unsur", verb: "olmalДұdДұr" },
    set: { unit: "unsur", verb: "olmalДұdДұr" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "giren",
    email: "epostagГўh",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO hengГўmДұ",
    date: "ISO tarihi",
    time: "ISO zamanДұ",
    duration: "ISO mГјddeti",
    ipv4: "IPv4 niЕҹГўnДұ",
