    ipv6: "IPv6 niЕҹГўnДұ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 menzili",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 menzili",
    base64: "base64-Еҹifreli metin",
    base64url: "base64url-Еҹifreli metin",
    json_string: "JSON metin",
    e164: "E.164 sayДұsДұ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "giren",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "numara",
    array: "saf",
    null: "gayb",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `FГўsit giren: umulan instanceof ${issue.expected}, alДұnan ${received}`;
        }
        return `FГўsit giren: umulan ${expected}, alДұnan ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `FГўsit giren: umulan ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `FГўsit tercih: mГ»teberler ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Fazla bГјyГјk: ${issue.origin ?? "value"}, ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elements"} sahip olmalДұydДұ.`;
        return `Fazla bГјyГјk: ${issue.origin ?? "value"}, ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} olmalДұydДұ.`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Fazla kГјГ§Гјk: ${issue.origin}, ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit} sahip olmalДұydДұ.`;
        }

        return `Fazla kГјГ§Гјk: ${issue.origin}, ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} olmalДұydДұ.`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `FГўsit metin: "${_issue.prefix}" ile baЕҹlamalДұ.`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `FГўsit metin: "${_issue.suffix}" ile bitmeli.`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `FГўsit metin: "${_issue.includes}" ihtivГў etmeli.`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `FГўsit metin: ${_issue.pattern} nakЕҹДұna uymalДұ.`;
        return `FГўsit ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `FГўsit sayДұ: ${issue.divisor} katДұ olmalДұydДұ.`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `TanДұnmayan anahtar ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `${issue.origin} iГ§in tanДұnmayan anahtar var.`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Giren tanДұnamadДұ.";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `${issue.origin} iГ§in tanДұnmayan kДұymet var.`;
      default:
        return `KДұymet tanДұnamadДұ.`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\pl.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "znakГіw", verb: "mieДҮ" },
    file: { unit: "bajtГіw", verb: "mieДҮ" },
    array: { unit: "elementГіw", verb: "mieДҮ" },
    set: { unit: "elementГіw", verb: "mieДҮ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "wyraЕјenie",
    email: "adres email",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "data i godzina w formacie ISO",
    date: "data w formacie ISO",
    time: "godzina w formacie ISO",
    duration: "czas trwania ISO",
    ipv4: "adres IPv4",
    ipv6: "adres IPv6",
    cidrv4: "zakres IPv4",
    cidrv6: "zakres IPv6",
    base64: "ciД…g znakГіw zakodowany w formacie base64",
    base64url: "ciД…g znakГіw zakodowany w formacie base64url",
    json_string: "ciД…g znakГіw w formacie JSON",
    e164: "liczba E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "wejЕӣcie",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "liczba",
    array: "tablica",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `NieprawidЕӮowe dane wejЕӣciowe: oczekiwano instanceof ${issue.expected}, otrzymano ${received}`;
        }
        return `NieprawidЕӮowe dane wejЕӣciowe: oczekiwano ${expected}, otrzymano ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `NieprawidЕӮowe dane wejЕӣciowe: oczekiwano ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `NieprawidЕӮowa opcja: oczekiwano jednej z wartoЕӣci ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Za duЕјa wartoЕӣДҮ: oczekiwano, Ејe ${issue.origin ?? "wartoЕӣДҮ"} bДҷdzie mieДҮ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementГіw"}`;
        }
        return `Zbyt duЕј(y/a/e): oczekiwano, Ејe ${issue.origin ?? "wartoЕӣДҮ"} bДҷdzie wynosiДҮ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Za maЕӮa wartoЕӣДҮ: oczekiwano, Ејe ${issue.origin ?? "wartoЕӣДҮ"} bДҷdzie mieДҮ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementГіw"}`;
        }
        return `Zbyt maЕӮ(y/a/e): oczekiwano, Ејe ${issue.origin ?? "wartoЕӣДҮ"} bДҷdzie wynosiДҮ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with")
          return `NieprawidЕӮowy ciД…g znakГіw: musi zaczynaДҮ siДҷ od "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `NieprawidЕӮowy ciД…g znakГіw: musi koЕ„czyДҮ siДҷ na "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `NieprawidЕӮowy ciД…g znakГіw: musi zawieraДҮ "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `NieprawidЕӮowy ciД…g znakГіw: musi odpowiadaДҮ wzorcowi ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `NieprawidЕӮow(y/a/e) ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `NieprawidЕӮowa liczba: musi byДҮ wielokrotnoЕӣciД… ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Nierozpoznane klucze${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `NieprawidЕӮowy klucz w ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "NieprawidЕӮowe dane wejЕӣciowe";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `NieprawidЕӮowa wartoЕӣДҮ w ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `NieprawidЕӮowe dane wejЕӣciowe`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ps.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "ШӘЩҲЪ©ЩҠ", verb: "ЩҲЩ„ШұЩҠ" },
    file: { unit: "ШЁШ§ЫҢЩјШі", verb: "ЩҲЩ„ШұЩҠ" },
    array: { unit: "ШӘЩҲЪ©ЩҠ", verb: "ЩҲЩ„ШұЩҠ" },
    set: { unit: "ШӘЩҲЪ©ЩҠ", verb: "ЩҲЩ„ШұЩҠ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЩҠ",
    email: "ШЁШұЫҢЪҡЩҶШ§Щ„ЫҢЪ©",
    url: "ЫҢЩҲ ШўШұ Ш§Щ„",
    emoji: "Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҠ",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ЩҶЫҢЩјЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲШ®ШӘ",
    date: "ЩҶЫҗЩјЩҮ",
    time: "ЩҲШ®ШӘ",
    duration: "Щ…ЩҲШҜЩҮ",
    ipv4: "ШҜ IPv4 ЩҫШӘЩҮ",
    ipv6: "ШҜ IPv6 ЩҫШӘЩҮ",
    cidrv4: "ШҜ IPv4 ШіШ§ШӯЩҮ",
    cidrv6: "ШҜ IPv6 ШіШ§ШӯЩҮ",
    base64: "base64-encoded Щ…ШӘЩҶ",
    base64url: "base64url-encoded Щ…ШӘЩҶ",
    json_string: "JSON Щ…ШӘЩҶ",
    e164: "ШҜ E.164 ШҙЩ…ЫҗШұЩҮ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЩҠ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "Ш№ШҜШҜ",
    array: "Ш§ШұЫҗ",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЩҠ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ instanceof ${issue.expected} ЩҲШ§ЫҢ, Щ…Ъ«Шұ ${received} ШӘШұЩ„Ш§ШіЩҮ ШҙЩҲ`;
        }
        return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЩҠ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${expected} ЩҲШ§ЫҢ, Щ…Ъ«Шұ ${received} ШӘШұЩ„Ш§ШіЩҮ ШҙЩҲ`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) {
          return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЩҠ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])} ЩҲШ§ЫҢ`;
        }
        return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… Ш§ЩҶШӘШ®Ш§ШЁ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ЫҢЩҲ Щ„ЩҮ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")} Ъ…Ш®ЩҮ ЩҲШ§ЫҢ`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `ЪүЫҢШұ Щ„ЩҲЫҢ: ${issue.origin ?? "Ш§ШұШІЪҡШӘ"} ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "Ш№ЩҶШөШұЩҲЩҶЩҮ"} ЩҲЩ„ШұЩҠ`;
        }
        return `ЪүЫҢШұ Щ„ЩҲЫҢ: ${issue.origin ?? "Ш§ШұШІЪҡШӘ"} ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ЩҲЩҠ`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `ЪүЫҢШұ Ъ©ЩҲЪҶЩҶЫҢ: ${issue.origin} ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit} ЩҲЩ„ШұЩҠ`;
        }
        return `ЪүЫҢШұ Ъ©ЩҲЪҶЩҶЫҢ: ${issue.origin} ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ЩҲЩҠ`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… Щ…ШӘЩҶ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШҜ "${_issue.prefix}" ШіШұЩҮ ЩҫЫҢЩ„ ШҙЩҠ`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") {
          return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… Щ…ШӘЩҶ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШҜ "${_issue.suffix}" ШіШұЩҮ ЩҫШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҮ ЩҲШұШіЩҠЪ–ЩҠ`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "includes") {
          return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… Щ…ШӘЩҶ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ "${_issue.includes}" ЩҲЩ„ШұЩҠ`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "regex") {
          return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… Щ…ШӘЩҶ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШҜ ${_issue.pattern} ШіШұЩҮ Щ…Ш·Ш§ШЁЩӮШӘ ЩҲЩ„ШұЩҠ`;
        }
        return `${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format} ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… ШҜЫҢ`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… Ш№ШҜШҜ: ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ШҜ ${issue.divisor} Щ…Ш¶ШұШЁ ЩҲЩҠ`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪүЩҲЩҶЩҮ" : "Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪү"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪү ЩҫЩҮ ${issue.origin} Ъ©Ыҗ`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ…ЩҮ ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЩҠ`;
      case "invalid_element":
        return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ… Ш№ЩҶШөШұ ЩҫЩҮ ${issue.origin} Ъ©Ыҗ`;
      default:
        return `ЩҶШ§ШіЩ…ЩҮ ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЩҠ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\pt.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "caracteres", verb: "ter" },
    file: { unit: "bytes", verb: "ter" },
    array: { unit: "itens", verb: "ter" },
    set: { unit: "itens", verb: "ter" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "padrГЈo",
    email: "endereГ§o de e-mail",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "data e hora ISO",
    date: "data ISO",
    time: "hora ISO",
    duration: "duraГ§ГЈo ISO",
    ipv4: "endereГ§o IPv4",
    ipv6: "endereГ§o IPv6",
    cidrv4: "faixa de IPv4",
    cidrv6: "faixa de IPv6",
    base64: "texto codificado em base64",
    base64url: "URL codificada em base64",
    json_string: "texto JSON",
    e164: "nГәmero E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "entrada",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "nГәmero",
    null: "nulo",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Tipo invГЎlido: esperado instanceof ${issue.expected}, recebido ${received}`;
        }
        return `Tipo invГЎlido: esperado ${expected}, recebido ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `Entrada invГЎlida: esperado ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `OpГ§ГЈo invГЎlida: esperada uma das ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Muito grande: esperado que ${issue.origin ?? "valor"} tivesse ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementos"}`;
        return `Muito grande: esperado que ${issue.origin ?? "valor"} fosse ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Muito pequeno: esperado que ${issue.origin} tivesse ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Muito pequeno: esperado que ${issue.origin} fosse ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `Texto invГЎlido: deve comeГ§ar com "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Texto invГЎlido: deve terminar com "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Texto invГЎlido: deve incluir "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Texto invГЎlido: deve corresponder ao padrГЈo ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format} invГЎlido`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `NГәmero invГЎlido: deve ser mГәltiplo de ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Chave${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} desconhecida${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Chave invГЎlida em ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Entrada invГЎlida";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Valor invГЎlido em ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Campo invГЎlido`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ru.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

function getRussianPlural(count: number, one: string, few: string, many: string): string {
  const absCount = Math.abs(count);
  const lastDigit = absCount % 10;
  const lastTwoDigits = absCount % 100;

  if (lastTwoDigits >= 11 && lastTwoDigits <= 19) {
    return many;
  }

  if (lastDigit === 1) {
    return one;
  }

  if (lastDigit >= 2 && lastDigit <= 4) {
    return few;
  }

  return many;
}

interface RussianSizable {
  unit: {
    one: string;
    few: string;
    many: string;
  };
  verb: string;
}
const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, RussianSizable> = {
    string: {
      unit: {
        one: "СҒРёРјРІРҫР»",
        few: "СҒРёРјРІРҫР»Р°",
        many: "СҒРёРјРІРҫР»РҫРІ",
      },
      verb: "РёРјРөСӮСҢ",
    },
    file: {
      unit: {
        one: "РұР°Р№СӮ",
        few: "РұР°Р№СӮР°",
        many: "РұР°Р№СӮ",
      },
      verb: "РёРјРөСӮСҢ",
    },
    array: {
      unit: {
        one: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮ",
        few: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮР°",
        many: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮРҫРІ",
      },
      verb: "РёРјРөСӮСҢ",
    },
    set: {
      unit: {
        one: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮ",
        few: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮР°",
        many: "СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮРҫРІ",
      },
      verb: "РёРјРөСӮСҢ",
    },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): RussianSizable | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "РІРІРҫРҙ",
    email: "email Р°РҙСҖРөСҒ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "СҚРјРҫРҙР·Рё",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO РҙР°СӮР° Рё РІСҖРөРјСҸ",
    date: "ISO РҙР°СӮР°",
    time: "ISO РІСҖРөРјСҸ",
    duration: "ISO РҙР»РёСӮРөР»СҢРҪРҫСҒСӮСҢ",
    ipv4: "IPv4 Р°РҙСҖРөСҒ",
    ipv6: "IPv6 Р°РҙСҖРөСҒ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 РҙРёР°РҝР°Р·РҫРҪ",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 РҙРёР°РҝР°Р·РҫРҪ",
    base64: "СҒСӮСҖРҫРәР° РІ С„РҫСҖРјР°СӮРө base64",
    base64url: "СҒСӮСҖРҫРәР° РІ С„РҫСҖРјР°СӮРө base64url",
    json_string: "JSON СҒСӮСҖРҫРәР°",
    e164: "РҪРҫРјРөСҖ E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "РІРІРҫРҙ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "СҮРёСҒР»Рҫ",
    array: "РјР°СҒСҒРёРІ",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪСӢР№ РІРІРҫРҙ: РҫР¶РёРҙР°Р»РҫСҒСҢ instanceof ${issue.expected}, РҝРҫР»СғСҮРөРҪРҫ ${received}`;
        }
        return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪСӢР№ РІРІРҫРҙ: РҫР¶РёРҙР°Р»РҫСҒСҢ ${expected}, РҝРҫР»СғСҮРөРҪРҫ ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪСӢР№ РІРІРҫРҙ: РҫР¶РёРҙР°Р»РҫСҒСҢ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪСӢР№ РІР°СҖРёР°РҪСӮ: РҫР¶РёРҙР°Р»РҫСҒСҢ РҫРҙРҪРҫ РёР· ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          const maxValue = Number(issue.maximum);
          const unit = getRussianPlural(maxValue, sizing.unit.one, sizing.unit.few, sizing.unit.many);
          return `РЎР»РёСҲРәРҫРј РұРҫР»СҢСҲРҫРө Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРёРө: РҫР¶РёРҙР°Р»РҫСҒСҢ, СҮСӮРҫ ${issue.origin ?? "Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРёРө"} РұСғРҙРөСӮ РёРјРөСӮСҢ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${unit}`;
        }
        return `РЎР»РёСҲРәРҫРј РұРҫР»СҢСҲРҫРө Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРёРө: РҫР¶РёРҙР°Р»РҫСҒСҢ, СҮСӮРҫ ${issue.origin ?? "Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРёРө"} РұСғРҙРөСӮ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          const minValue = Number(issue.minimum);
          const unit = getRussianPlural(minValue, sizing.unit.one, sizing.unit.few, sizing.unit.many);
          return `РЎР»РёСҲРәРҫРј РјР°Р»РөРҪСҢРәРҫРө Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРёРө: РҫР¶РёРҙР°Р»РҫСҒСҢ, СҮСӮРҫ ${issue.origin} РұСғРҙРөСӮ РёРјРөСӮСҢ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${unit}`;
        }
        return `РЎР»РёСҲРәРҫРј РјР°Р»РөРҪСҢРәРҫРө Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРёРө: РҫР¶РёРҙР°Р»РҫСҒСҢ, СҮСӮРҫ ${issue.origin} РұСғРҙРөСӮ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪР°СҸ СҒСӮСҖРҫРәР°: РҙРҫР»Р¶РҪР° РҪР°СҮРёРҪР°СӮСҢСҒСҸ СҒ "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪР°СҸ СҒСӮСҖРҫРәР°: РҙРҫР»Р¶РҪР° Р·Р°РәР°РҪСҮРёРІР°СӮСҢСҒСҸ РҪР° "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪР°СҸ СҒСӮСҖРҫРәР°: РҙРҫР»Р¶РҪР° СҒРҫРҙРөСҖР¶Р°СӮСҢ "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪР°СҸ СҒСӮСҖРҫРәР°: РҙРҫР»Р¶РҪР° СҒРҫРҫСӮРІРөСӮСҒСӮРІРҫРІР°СӮСҢ СҲР°РұР»РҫРҪСғ ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪСӢР№ ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪРҫРө СҮРёСҒР»Рҫ: РҙРҫР»Р¶РҪРҫ РұСӢСӮСҢ РәСҖР°СӮРҪСӢРј ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `РқРөСҖР°СҒРҝРҫР·РҪР°РҪРҪ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "СӢРө" : "СӢР№"} РәР»СҺСҮ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "Рё" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪСӢР№ РәР»СҺСҮ РІ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "РқРөРІРөСҖРҪСӢРө РІС…РҫРҙРҪСӢРө РҙР°РҪРҪСӢРө";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪРҫРө Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРёРө РІ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `РқРөРІРөСҖРҪСӢРө РІС…РҫРҙРҪСӢРө РҙР°РҪРҪСӢРө`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\sl.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "znakov", verb: "imeti" },
    file: { unit: "bajtov", verb: "imeti" },
    array: { unit: "elementov", verb: "imeti" },
    set: { unit: "elementov", verb: "imeti" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "vnos",
    email: "e-poЕЎtni naslov",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO datum in ДҚas",
    date: "ISO datum",
    time: "ISO ДҚas",
    duration: "ISO trajanje",
    ipv4: "IPv4 naslov",
    ipv6: "IPv6 naslov",
    cidrv4: "obseg IPv4",
    cidrv6: "obseg IPv6",
    base64: "base64 kodiran niz",
    base64url: "base64url kodiran niz",
    json_string: "JSON niz",
    e164: "E.164 ЕЎtevilka",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "vnos",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "ЕЎtevilo",
    array: "tabela",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Neveljaven vnos: priДҚakovano instanceof ${issue.expected}, prejeto ${received}`;
        }
        return `Neveljaven vnos: priДҚakovano ${expected}, prejeto ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `Neveljaven vnos: priДҚakovano ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Neveljavna moЕҫnost: priДҚakovano eno izmed ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Preveliko: priДҚakovano, da bo ${issue.origin ?? "vrednost"} imelo ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "elementov"}`;
        return `Preveliko: priДҚakovano, da bo ${issue.origin ?? "vrednost"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Premajhno: priДҚakovano, da bo ${issue.origin} imelo ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }
        return `Premajhno: priДҚakovano, da bo ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `Neveljaven niz: mora se zaДҚeti z "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Neveljaven niz: mora se konДҚati z "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Neveljaven niz: mora vsebovati "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Neveljaven niz: mora ustrezati vzorcu ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Neveljaven ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Neveljavno ЕЎtevilo: mora biti veДҚkratnik ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Neprepoznan${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "i kljuДҚi" : " kljuДҚ"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Neveljaven kljuДҚ v ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Neveljaven vnos";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Neveljavna vrednost v ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return "Neveljaven vnos";
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\sv.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "tecken", verb: "att ha" },
    file: { unit: "bytes", verb: "att ha" },
    array: { unit: "objekt", verb: "att innehГҘlla" },
    set: { unit: "objekt", verb: "att innehГҘlla" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "reguljГӨrt uttryck",
    email: "e-postadress",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO-datum och tid",
    date: "ISO-datum",
    time: "ISO-tid",
    duration: "ISO-varaktighet",
    ipv4: "IPv4-intervall",
    ipv6: "IPv6-intervall",
    cidrv4: "IPv4-spektrum",
    cidrv6: "IPv6-spektrum",
    base64: "base64-kodad strГӨng",
    base64url: "base64url-kodad strГӨng",
    json_string: "JSON-strГӨng",
    e164: "E.164-nummer",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "mall-literal",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "antal",
    array: "lista",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Ogiltig inmatning: fГ¶rvГӨntat instanceof ${issue.expected}, fick ${received}`;
        }
        return `Ogiltig inmatning: fГ¶rvГӨntat ${expected}, fick ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `Ogiltig inmatning: fГ¶rvГӨntat ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `Ogiltigt val: fГ¶rvГӨntade en av ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `FГ¶r stor(t): fГ¶rvГӨntade ${issue.origin ?? "vГӨrdet"} att ha ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "element"}`;
        }
        return `FГ¶r stor(t): fГ¶rvГӨntat ${issue.origin ?? "vГӨrdet"} att ha ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `FГ¶r lite(t): fГ¶rvГӨntade ${issue.origin ?? "vГӨrdet"} att ha ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }
        return `FГ¶r lite(t): fГ¶rvГӨntade ${issue.origin ?? "vГӨrdet"} att ha ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `Ogiltig strГӨng: mГҘste bГ¶rja med "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Ogiltig strГӨng: mГҘste sluta med "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Ogiltig strГӨng: mГҘste innehГҘlla "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Ogiltig strГӨng: mГҘste matcha mГ¶nstret "${_issue.pattern}"`;
        return `Ogiltig(t) ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Ogiltigt tal: mГҘste vara en multipel av ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "OkГӨnda nycklar" : "OkГӨnd nyckel"}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `Ogiltig nyckel i ${issue.origin ?? "vГӨrdet"}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Ogiltig input";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `Ogiltigt vГӨrde i ${issue.origin ?? "vГӨrdet"}`;
      default:
        return `Ogiltig input`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ta.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "а®Һа®ҙаҜҒа®ӨаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ", verb: "а®•аҜҠа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ" },
    file: { unit: "а®ӘаҜҲа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®•а®іаҜҚ", verb: "а®•аҜҠа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ" },
    array: { unit: "а®үа®ұаҜҒа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒа®•а®іаҜҚ", verb: "а®•аҜҠа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ" },
    set: { unit: "а®үа®ұаҜҒа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒа®•а®іаҜҚ", verb: "а®•аҜҠа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "а®үа®іаҜҚа®іаҜҖа®ҹаҜҒ",
    email: "а®®а®ҝа®©аҜҚа®©а®һаҜҚа®ҡа®ІаҜҚ а®®аҜҒа®•а®өа®°а®ҝ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO а®ӨаҜҮа®Өа®ҝ а®ЁаҜҮа®°а®®аҜҚ",
    date: "ISO а®ӨаҜҮа®Өа®ҝ",
    time: "ISO а®ЁаҜҮа®°а®®аҜҚ",
    duration: "ISO а®•а®ҫа®І а®…а®іа®өаҜҒ",
    ipv4: "IPv4 а®®аҜҒа®•а®өа®°а®ҝ",
    ipv6: "IPv6 а®®аҜҒа®•а®өа®°а®ҝ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 а®өа®°а®®аҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 а®өа®°а®®аҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ",
    base64: "base64-encoded а®ҡа®°а®®аҜҚ",
    base64url: "base64url-encoded а®ҡа®°а®®аҜҚ",
    json_string: "JSON а®ҡа®°а®®аҜҚ",
    e164: "E.164 а®Һа®ЈаҜҚ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "input",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "а®Һа®ЈаҜҚ",
    array: "а®…а®Ја®ҝ",
    null: "а®өаҜҶа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҲ",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®үа®іаҜҚа®іаҜҖа®ҹаҜҒ: а®Һа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ instanceof ${issue.expected}, а®ӘаҜҶа®ұа®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ ${received}`;
        }
        return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®үа®іаҜҚа®іаҜҖа®ҹаҜҒ: а®Һа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ ${expected}, а®ӘаҜҶа®ұа®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®үа®іаҜҚа®іаҜҖа®ҹаҜҒ: а®Һа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®өа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®®аҜҚ: а®Һа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")} а®Үа®ІаҜҚ а®’а®©аҜҚа®ұаҜҒ`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `а®®а®ҝа®• а®ӘаҜҶа®°а®ҝа®Ҝа®ӨаҜҒ: а®Һа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ ${issue.origin ?? "а®®а®Өа®ҝа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "а®үа®ұаҜҒа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒа®•а®іаҜҚ"} а®Ҷа®• а®Үа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ`;
        }
        return `а®®а®ҝа®• а®ӘаҜҶа®°а®ҝа®Ҝа®ӨаҜҒ: а®Һа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ ${issue.origin ?? "а®®а®Өа®ҝа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} а®Ҷа®• а®Үа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `а®®а®ҝа®•а®ҡаҜҚ а®ҡа®ҝа®ұа®ҝа®Ҝа®ӨаҜҒ: а®Һа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit} а®Ҷа®• а®Үа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ`; //
        }

        return `а®®а®ҝа®•а®ҡаҜҚ а®ҡа®ҝа®ұа®ҝа®Ҝа®ӨаҜҒ: а®Һа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ӨаҜҒ ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} а®Ҷа®• а®Үа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®ҡа®°а®®аҜҚ: "${_issue.prefix}" а®Үа®ІаҜҚ а®ӨаҜҠа®ҹа®ҷаҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®ҡа®°а®®аҜҚ: "${_issue.suffix}" а®Үа®ІаҜҚ а®®аҜҒа®ҹа®ҝа®өа®ҹаҜҲа®Ҝ а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®ҡа®°а®®аҜҚ: "${_issue.includes}" а®җ а®үа®іаҜҚа®іа®ҹа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®ҡа®°а®®аҜҚ: ${_issue.pattern} а®®аҜҒа®ұаҜҲа®Әа®ҫа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®ҹа®©аҜҚ а®ӘаҜҠа®°аҜҒа®ЁаҜҚа®Ө а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ`;
        return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®Һа®ЈаҜҚ: ${issue.divisor} а®Үа®©аҜҚ а®Әа®Іа®®а®ҫа®• а®Үа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `а®…а®ҹаҜҲа®Ҝа®ҫа®іа®®аҜҚ а®ӨаҜҶа®°а®ҝа®Ҝа®ҫа®Ө а®өа®ҝа®ҡаҜҲ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "а®•а®іаҜҚ" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `${issue.origin} а®Үа®ІаҜҚ а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®өа®ҝа®ҡаҜҲ`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®үа®іаҜҚа®іаҜҖа®ҹаҜҒ";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `${issue.origin} а®Үа®ІаҜҚ а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®®а®Өа®ҝа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ`;
      default:
        return `а®Өа®өа®ұа®ҫа®© а®үа®іаҜҚа®іаҜҖа®ҹаҜҒ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\th.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёұаёҒаё©аёЈ", verb: "аё„аё§аёЈаёЎаёө" },
    file: { unit: "а№„аёҡаё•а№Ң", verb: "аё„аё§аёЈаёЎаёө" },
    array: { unit: "аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ", verb: "аё„аё§аёЈаёЎаёө" },
    set: { unit: "аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ", verb: "аё„аё§аёЈаёЎаёө" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаёӣа№үаёӯаёҷ",
    email: "аё—аёөа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "аёӯаёҙа№ӮаёЎаёҲаёҙ",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№Ғаёҡаёҡ ISO",
    date: "аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Ғаёҡаёҡ ISO",
    time: "а№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№Ғаёҡаёҡ ISO",
    duration: "аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№Ғаёҡаёҡ ISO",
    ipv4: "аё—аёөа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳ IPv4",
    ipv6: "аё—аёөа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳ IPv6",
    cidrv4: "аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮ IP а№Ғаёҡаёҡ IPv4",
    cidrv6: "аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮ IP а№Ғаёҡаёҡ IPv6",
    base64: "аёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№Ғаёҡаёҡ Base64",
    base64url: "аёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№Ғаёҡаёҡ Base64 аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ URL",
    json_string: "аёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№Ғаёҡаёҡ JSON",
    e164: "а№ҖаёҡаёӯаёЈа№Ңа№Ӯаё—аёЈаёЁаёұаёһаё—а№ҢаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё—аёЁ (E.164)",
    jwt: "а№Ӯаё—а№Җаё„аёҷ JWT",
    template_literal: "аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаёӣа№үаёӯаёҷ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "аё•аёұаё§а№ҖаёҘаёӮ",
    array: "аёӯаёІаёЈа№Ңа№ҖаёЈаёўа№Ң (Array)",
    null: "а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёөаё„а№ҲаёІ (null)",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: аё„аё§аёЈа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ instanceof ${issue.expected} а№Ғаё•а№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡ ${received}`;
        }
        return `аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: аё„аё§аёЈа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ ${expected} а№Ғаё•а№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡ ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `аё„а№ҲаёІа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: аё„аё§аёЈа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `аё•аёұаё§а№ҖаёҘаё·аёӯаёҒа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: аё„аё§аёЈа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё«аёҷаё¶а№ҲаёҮа№ғаёҷ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷ" : "аёҷа№үаёӯаёўаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІ";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `а№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”: ${issue.origin ?? "аё„а№ҲаёІ"} аё„аё§аёЈаёЎаёө${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ"}`;
        return `а№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”: ${issue.origin ?? "аё„а№ҲаёІ"} аё„аё§аёЈаёЎаёө${adj} ${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮаёҷа№үаёӯаёў" : "аёЎаёІаёҒаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІ";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `аёҷа№үаёӯаёўаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”: ${issue.origin} аё„аё§аёЈаёЎаёө${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `аёҷа№үаёӯаёўаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”: ${issue.origin} аё„аё§аёЈаёЎаёө${adj} ${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: аёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӮаё¶а№үаёҷаё•а№үаёҷаё”а№үаё§аёў "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: аёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҘаёҮаё—а№үаёІаёўаё”а№үаё§аёў "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: аёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө "${_issue.includes}" аёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎ`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё•аёЈаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡаёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡаё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `аё•аёұаё§а№ҖаёҘаёӮа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё«аёІаёЈаё”а№үаё§аёў ${issue.divisor} а№„аё”а№үаёҘаёҮаё•аёұаё§`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `аёһаёҡаё„аёөаёўа№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `аё„аёөаёўа№Ңа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаёҷ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ: а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё•аёЈаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡаёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡаёўаё№а№Җаёҷаёөаёўаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”а№„аё§а№ү";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаёҷ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\tr.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "karakter", verb: "olmalДұ" },
    file: { unit: "bayt", verb: "olmalДұ" },
    array: { unit: "Г¶Дҹe", verb: "olmalДұ" },
    set: { unit: "Г¶Дҹe", verb: "olmalДұ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "girdi",
    email: "e-posta adresi",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO tarih ve saat",
    date: "ISO tarih",
    time: "ISO saat",
    duration: "ISO sГјre",
    ipv4: "IPv4 adresi",
    ipv6: "IPv6 adresi",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 aralДұДҹДұ",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 aralДұДҹДұ",
    base64: "base64 ile ЕҹifrelenmiЕҹ metin",
    base64url: "base64url ile ЕҹifrelenmiЕҹ metin",
    json_string: "JSON dizesi",
    e164: "E.164 sayДұsДұ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "Еһablon dizesi",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `GeГ§ersiz deДҹer: beklenen instanceof ${issue.expected}, alДұnan ${received}`;
        }
        return `GeГ§ersiz deДҹer: beklenen ${expected}, alДұnan ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `GeГ§ersiz deДҹer: beklenen ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `GeГ§ersiz seГ§enek: aЕҹaДҹДұdakilerden biri olmalДұ: ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `ГҮok bГјyГјk: beklenen ${issue.origin ?? "deДҹer"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "Г¶Дҹe"}`;
        return `ГҮok bГјyГјk: beklenen ${issue.origin ?? "deДҹer"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) return `ГҮok kГјГ§Гјk: beklenen ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        return `ГҮok kГјГ§Гјk: beklenen ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `GeГ§ersiz metin: "${_issue.prefix}" ile baЕҹlamalДұ`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `GeГ§ersiz metin: "${_issue.suffix}" ile bitmeli`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `GeГ§ersiz metin: "${_issue.includes}" iГ§ermeli`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `GeГ§ersiz metin: ${_issue.pattern} desenine uymalДұ`;
        return `GeГ§ersiz ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `GeГ§ersiz sayДұ: ${issue.divisor} ile tam bГ¶lГјnebilmeli`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `TanДұnmayan anahtar${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "lar" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `${issue.origin} iГ§inde geГ§ersiz anahtar`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "GeГ§ersiz deДҹer";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `${issue.origin} iГ§inde geГ§ersiz deДҹer`;
      default:
        return `GeГ§ersiz deДҹer`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ua.ts" =====  
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import uk from "./uk.js";

/** @deprecated Use `uk` instead. */
export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return uk();
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\uk.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "СҒРёРјРІРҫР»С–РІ", verb: "РјР°СӮРёРјРө" },
    file: { unit: "РұР°Р№СӮС–РІ", verb: "РјР°СӮРёРјРө" },
    array: { unit: "РөР»РөРјРөРҪСӮС–РІ", verb: "РјР°СӮРёРјРө" },
    set: { unit: "РөР»РөРјРөРҪСӮС–РІ", verb: "РјР°СӮРёРјРө" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "РІС…С–РҙРҪС– РҙР°РҪС–",
    email: "Р°РҙСҖРөСҒР° РөР»РөРәСӮСҖРҫРҪРҪРҫС— РҝРҫСҲСӮРё",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "РөРјРҫРҙР·С–",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "РҙР°СӮР° СӮР° СҮР°СҒ ISO",
    date: "РҙР°СӮР° ISO",
    time: "СҮР°СҒ ISO",
    duration: "СӮСҖРёРІР°Р»С–СҒСӮСҢ ISO",
    ipv4: "Р°РҙСҖРөСҒР° IPv4",
    ipv6: "Р°РҙСҖРөСҒР° IPv6",
    cidrv4: "РҙС–Р°РҝР°Р·РҫРҪ IPv4",
    cidrv6: "РҙС–Р°РҝР°Р·РҫРҪ IPv6",
    base64: "СҖСҸРҙРҫРә Сғ РәРҫРҙСғРІР°РҪРҪС– base64",
    base64url: "СҖСҸРҙРҫРә Сғ РәРҫРҙСғРІР°РҪРҪС– base64url",
    json_string: "СҖСҸРҙРҫРә JSON",
    e164: "РҪРҫРјРөСҖ E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "РІС…С–РҙРҪС– РҙР°РҪС–",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "СҮРёСҒР»Рҫ",
    array: "РјР°СҒРёРІ",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪС– РІС…С–РҙРҪС– РҙР°РҪС–: РҫСҮС–РәСғС”СӮСҢСҒСҸ instanceof ${issue.expected}, РҫСӮСҖРёРјР°РҪРҫ ${received}`;
        }
        return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪС– РІС…С–РҙРҪС– РҙР°РҪС–: РҫСҮС–РәСғС”СӮСҢСҒСҸ ${expected}, РҫСӮСҖРёРјР°РҪРҫ ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪС– РІС…С–РҙРҪС– РҙР°РҪС–: РҫСҮС–РәСғС”СӮСҢСҒСҸ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪР° РҫРҝСҶС–СҸ: РҫСҮС–РәСғС”СӮСҢСҒСҸ РҫРҙРҪРө Р· ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Р—Р°РҪР°РҙСӮРҫ РІРөР»РёРәРө: РҫСҮС–РәСғС”СӮСҢСҒСҸ, СүРҫ ${issue.origin ?? "Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРҪСҸ"} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "РөР»РөРјРөРҪСӮС–РІ"}`;
        return `Р—Р°РҪР°РҙСӮРҫ РІРөР»РёРәРө: РҫСҮС–РәСғС”СӮСҢСҒСҸ, СүРҫ ${issue.origin ?? "Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРҪСҸ"} РұСғРҙРө ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Р—Р°РҪР°РҙСӮРҫ РјР°Р»Рө: РҫСҮС–РәСғС”СӮСҢСҒСҸ, СүРҫ ${issue.origin} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `Р—Р°РҪР°РҙСӮРҫ РјР°Р»Рө: РҫСҮС–РәСғС”СӮСҢСҒСҸ, СүРҫ ${issue.origin} РұСғРҙРө ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪРёР№ СҖСҸРҙРҫРә: РҝРҫРІРёРҪРөРҪ РҝРҫСҮРёРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ Р· "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪРёР№ СҖСҸРҙРҫРә: РҝРҫРІРёРҪРөРҪ Р·Р°РәС–РҪСҮСғРІР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҪР° "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪРёР№ СҖСҸРҙРҫРә: РҝРҫРІРёРҪРөРҪ РјС–СҒСӮРёСӮРё "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪРёР№ СҖСҸРҙРҫРә: РҝРҫРІРёРҪРөРҪ РІС–РҙРҝРҫРІС–РҙР°СӮРё СҲР°РұР»РҫРҪСғ ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪРёР№ ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪРө СҮРёСҒР»Рҫ: РҝРҫРІРёРҪРҪРҫ РұСғСӮРё РәСҖР°СӮРҪРёРј ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `РқРөСҖРҫР·РҝС–Р·РҪР°РҪРёР№ РәР»СҺСҮ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "С–" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪРёР№ РәР»СҺСҮ Сғ ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪС– РІС…С–РҙРҪС– РҙР°РҪС–";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪРө Р·РҪР°СҮРөРҪРҪСҸ Сғ ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `РқРөРҝСҖР°РІРёР»СҢРҪС– РІС…С–РҙРҪС– РҙР°РҪС–`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\ur.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "ШӯШұЩҲЩҒ", verb: "ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§" },
    file: { unit: "ШЁШ§ШҰЩ№Ші", verb: "ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§" },
    array: { unit: "ШўШҰЩ№Щ…ШІ", verb: "ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§" },
    set: { unit: "ШўШҰЩ№Щ…ШІ", verb: "ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫЩ№",
    email: "Ш§ЫҢ Щ…ЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЫҢЪҲШұЫҢШі",
    url: "ЫҢЩҲ ШўШұ Ш§ЫҢЩ„",
    emoji: "Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЩҲШ¬ЫҢ",
    uuid: "ЫҢЩҲ ЫҢЩҲ ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ",
    uuidv4: "ЫҢЩҲ ЫҢЩҲ ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ ЩҲЫҢ 4",
    uuidv6: "ЫҢЩҲ ЫҢЩҲ ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ ЩҲЫҢ 6",
    nanoid: "ЩҶЫҢЩҶЩҲ ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ",
    guid: "Ш¬ЫҢ ЫҢЩҲ ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ",
    cuid: "ШіЫҢ ЫҢЩҲ ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ",
    cuid2: "ШіЫҢ ЫҢЩҲ ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ 2",
    ulid: "ЫҢЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩ„ ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ",
    xid: "Ш§ЫҢЪ©Ші ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ",
    ksuid: "Ъ©Ы’ Ш§ЫҢШі ЫҢЩҲ ШўШҰЫҢ ЪҲЫҢ",
    datetime: "ШўШҰЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШі Ш§ЩҲ ЪҲЫҢЩ№ Щ№Ш§ШҰЩ…",
    date: "ШўШҰЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШі Ш§ЩҲ ШӘШ§ШұЫҢШ®",
    time: "ШўШҰЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШі Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲЩӮШӘ",
    duration: "ШўШҰЫҢ Ш§ЫҢШі Ш§ЩҲ Щ…ШҜШӘ",
    ipv4: "ШўШҰЫҢ ЩҫЫҢ ЩҲЫҢ 4 Ш§ЫҢЪҲШұЫҢШі",
    ipv6: "ШўШҰЫҢ ЩҫЫҢ ЩҲЫҢ 6 Ш§ЫҢЪҲШұЫҢШі",
    cidrv4: "ШўШҰЫҢ ЩҫЫҢ ЩҲЫҢ 4 ШұЫҢЩҶШ¬",
    cidrv6: "ШўШҰЫҢ ЩҫЫҢ ЩҲЫҢ 6 ШұЫҢЩҶШ¬",
    base64: "ШЁЫҢШі 64 Ш§ЩҶ Ъ©ЩҲЪҲЪҲ ШіЩ№ШұЩҶЪҜ",
    base64url: "ШЁЫҢШі 64 ЫҢЩҲ ШўШұ Ш§ЫҢЩ„ Ш§ЩҶ Ъ©ЩҲЪҲЪҲ ШіЩ№ШұЩҶЪҜ",
    json_string: "Ш¬Ы’ Ш§ЫҢШі Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШіЩ№ШұЩҶЪҜ",
    e164: "Ш§ЫҢ 164 ЩҶЩ…ШЁШұ",
    jwt: "Ш¬Ы’ ЪҲШЁЩ„ЫҢЩҲ Щ№ЫҢ",
    template_literal: "Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫЩ№",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "ЩҶЩ…ШЁШұ",
    array: "ШўШұЫ’",
    null: "ЩҶЩ„",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `ШәЩ„Ш· Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫЩ№: instanceof ${issue.expected} Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШӘЪҫШ§ШҢ ${received} Щ…ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ЫҒЩҲШ§`;
        }
        return `ШәЩ„Ш· Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫЩ№: ${expected} Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШӘЪҫШ§ШҢ ${received} Щ…ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ЫҒЩҲШ§`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `ШәЩ„Ш· Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫЩ№: ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])} Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШӘЪҫШ§`;
        return `ШәЩ„Ш· ШўЩҫШҙЩҶ: ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")} Щ…ЫҢЪә ШіЫ’ Ш§ЫҢЪ© Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШӘЪҫШ§`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `ШЁЫҒШӘ ШЁЪ‘Ш§: ${issue.origin ?? "ЩҲЫҢЩ„ЫҢЩҲ"} Ъ©Ы’ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ"} ЫҒЩҲЩҶЫ’ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШӘЪҫЫ’`;
        return `ШЁЫҒШӘ ШЁЪ‘Ш§: ${issue.origin ?? "ЩҲЫҢЩ„ЫҢЩҲ"} Ъ©Ш§ ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШӘЪҫШ§`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `ШЁЫҒШӘ ЪҶЪҫЩҲЩ№Ш§: ${issue.origin} Ъ©Ы’ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit} ЫҒЩҲЩҶЫ’ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШӘЪҫЫ’`;
        }

        return `ШЁЫҒШӘ ЪҶЪҫЩҲЩ№Ш§: ${issue.origin} Ъ©Ш§ ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШӘЪҫШ§`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `ШәЩ„Ш· ШіЩ№ШұЩҶЪҜ: "${_issue.prefix}" ШіЫ’ ШҙШұЩҲШ№ ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§ ЪҶШ§ЫҒЫҢЫ’`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `ШәЩ„Ш· ШіЩ№ШұЩҶЪҜ: "${_issue.suffix}" ЩҫШұ Ш®ШӘЩ… ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§ ЪҶШ§ЫҒЫҢЫ’`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `ШәЩ„Ш· ШіЩ№ШұЩҶЪҜ: "${_issue.includes}" ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§ ЪҶШ§ЫҒЫҢЫ’`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `ШәЩ„Ш· ШіЩ№ШұЩҶЪҜ: ЩҫЫҢЩ№ШұЩҶ ${_issue.pattern} ШіЫ’ Щ…ЫҢЪҶ ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§ ЪҶШ§ЫҒЫҢЫ’`;
        return `ШәЩ„Ш· ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `ШәЩ„Ш· ЩҶЩ…ШЁШұ: ${issue.divisor} Ъ©Ш§ Щ…Ш¶Ш§Ш№ЩҒ ЫҒЩҲЩҶШ§ ЪҶШ§ЫҒЫҢЫ’`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `ШәЫҢШұ ШӘШіЩ„ЫҢЩ… ШҙШҜЫҒ Ъ©ЫҢ${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "ШІ" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, "ШҢ ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `${issue.origin} Щ…ЫҢЪә ШәЩ„Ш· Ъ©ЫҢ`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "ШәЩ„Ш· Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫЩ№";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `${issue.origin} Щ…ЫҢЪә ШәЩ„Ш· ЩҲЫҢЩ„ЫҢЩҲ`;
      default:
        return `ШәЩ„Ш· Ш§ЩҶ ЩҫЩ№`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\uz.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "belgi", verb: "boвҖҳlishi kerak" },
    file: { unit: "bayt", verb: "boвҖҳlishi kerak" },
    array: { unit: "element", verb: "boвҖҳlishi kerak" },
    set: { unit: "element", verb: "boвҖҳlishi kerak" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "kirish",
    email: "elektron pochta manzili",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO sana va vaqti",
    date: "ISO sana",
    time: "ISO vaqt",
    duration: "ISO davomiylik",
    ipv4: "IPv4 manzil",
    ipv6: "IPv6 manzil",
    mac: "MAC manzil",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 diapazon",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 diapazon",
    base64: "base64 kodlangan satr",
    base64url: "base64url kodlangan satr",
    json_string: "JSON satr",
    e164: "E.164 raqam",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "kirish",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "raqam",
    array: "massiv",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri kirish: kutilgan instanceof ${issue.expected}, qabul qilingan ${received}`;
        }
        return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri kirish: kutilgan ${expected}, qabul qilingan ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri kirish: kutilgan ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri variant: quyidagilardan biri kutilgan ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `Juda katta: kutilgan ${issue.origin ?? "qiymat"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit} ${sizing.verb}`;
        return `Juda katta: kutilgan ${issue.origin ?? "qiymat"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `Juda kichik: kutilgan ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit} ${sizing.verb}`;
        }
        return `Juda kichik: kutilgan ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri satr: "${_issue.prefix}" bilan boshlanishi kerak`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri satr: "${_issue.suffix}" bilan tugashi kerak`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri satr: "${_issue.includes}" ni oвҖҳz ichiga olishi kerak`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri satr: ${_issue.pattern} shabloniga mos kelishi kerak`;
        return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri raqam: ${issue.divisor} ning karralisi boвҖҳlishi kerak`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `NomaвҖҷlum kalit${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "lar" : ""}: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `${issue.origin} dagi kalit notoвҖҳgвҖҳri`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri kirish";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `${issue.origin} da notoвҖҳgвҖҳri qiymat`;
      default:
        return `NotoвҖҳgвҖҳri kirish`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\vi.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "kГҪ tб»ұ", verb: "cГі" },
    file: { unit: "byte", verb: "cГі" },
    array: { unit: "phбә§n tб»ӯ", verb: "cГі" },
    set: { unit: "phбә§n tб»ӯ", verb: "cГі" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "Д‘бә§u vГ o",
    email: "Д‘б»Ӣa chб»ү email",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ngГ y giб»қ ISO",
    date: "ngГ y ISO",
    time: "giб»қ ISO",
    duration: "khoбәЈng thб»қi gian ISO",
    ipv4: "Д‘б»Ӣa chб»ү IPv4",
    ipv6: "Д‘б»Ӣa chб»ү IPv6",
    cidrv4: "dбәЈi IPv4",
    cidrv6: "dбәЈi IPv6",
    base64: "chuб»—i mГЈ hГіa base64",
    base64url: "chuб»—i mГЈ hГіa base64url",
    json_string: "chuб»—i JSON",
    e164: "sб»‘ E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "Д‘бә§u vГ o",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "sб»‘",
    array: "mбәЈng",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `Дҗбә§u vГ o khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү: mong Д‘б»Јi instanceof ${issue.expected}, nhбәӯn Д‘Ж°б»Јc ${received}`;
        }
        return `Дҗбә§u vГ o khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү: mong Д‘б»Јi ${expected}, nhбәӯn Д‘Ж°б»Јc ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1)
          return `Дҗбә§u vГ o khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү: mong Д‘б»Јi ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `TГ№y chб»Қn khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү: mong Д‘б»Јi mб»ҷt trong cГЎc giГЎ trб»Ӣ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `QuГЎ lб»ӣn: mong Д‘б»Јi ${issue.origin ?? "giГЎ trб»Ӣ"} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "phбә§n tб»ӯ"}`;
        return `QuГЎ lб»ӣn: mong Д‘б»Јi ${issue.origin ?? "giГЎ trб»Ӣ"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `QuГЎ nhб»Ҹ: mong Д‘б»Јi ${issue.origin} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }

        return `QuГЎ nhб»Ҹ: mong Д‘б»Јi ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `Chuб»—i khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү: phбәЈi bбәҜt Д‘бә§u bбәұng "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `Chuб»—i khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү: phбәЈi kбәҝt thГәc bбәұng "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `Chuб»—i khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү: phбәЈi bao gб»“m "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `Chuб»—i khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү: phбәЈi khб»ӣp vб»ӣi mбә«u ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format} khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Sб»‘ khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү: phбәЈi lГ  bб»ҷi sб»‘ cб»§a ${issue.divisor}`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `KhГіa khГҙng Д‘Ж°б»Јc nhбәӯn dбәЎng: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `KhГіa khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү trong ${issue.origin}`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "Дҗбә§u vГ o khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `GiГЎ trб»Ӣ khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү trong ${issue.origin}`;
      default:
        return `Дҗбә§u vГ o khГҙng hб»Јp lб»Ү`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\yo.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "Г mi", verb: "nГӯ" },
    file: { unit: "bytes", verb: "nГӯ" },
    array: { unit: "nkan", verb: "nГӯ" },
    set: { unit: "nkan", verb: "nГӯ" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "бә№МҖrб»Қ Г¬bГЎwб»ҚlГ©",
    email: "Г dГӯrбә№МҒsГ¬ Г¬mбә№МҒlГ¬",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "Г kГіkГІ ISO",
    date: "б»Қjб»ҚМҒ ISO",
    time: "Г kГіkГІ ISO",
    duration: "Г kГіkГІ tГі pГ© ISO",
    ipv4: "Г dГӯrбә№МҒsГ¬ IPv4",
    ipv6: "Г dГӯrбә№МҒsГ¬ IPv6",
    cidrv4: "Г gbГЁgbГЁ IPv4",
    cidrv6: "Г gbГЁgbГЁ IPv6",
    base64: "б»ҚМҖrб»ҚМҖ tГӯ a kб»ҚМҒ nГӯ base64",
    base64url: "б»ҚМҖrб»ҚМҖ base64url",
    json_string: "б»ҚМҖrб»ҚМҖ JSON",
    e164: "nб»ҚМҒmbГ  E.164",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "бә№МҖrб»Қ Г¬bГЎwб»ҚlГ©",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "nб»ҚМҒmbГ ",
    array: "akopб»Қ",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `ГҢbГЎwб»ҚlГ© aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: a nГӯ lГЎti fi instanceof ${issue.expected}, Г mб»ҚМҖ a rГӯ ${received}`;
        }
        return `ГҢbГЎwб»ҚlГ© aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: a nГӯ lГЎti fi ${expected}, Г mб»ҚМҖ a rГӯ ${received}`;
      }

      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `ГҢbГЎwб»ҚlГ© aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: a nГӯ lГЎti fi ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `ГҖб№ЈГ yГ n aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: yan б»ҚМҖkan lГЎra ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;

      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `TГі pб»ҚМҖ jГ№: a nГӯ lГЎti jбә№МҒ pГ© ${issue.origin ?? "iye"} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.maximum} ${sizing.unit}`;
        return `TГі pб»ҚМҖ jГ№: a nГӯ lГЎti jбә№МҒ ${adj}${issue.maximum}`;
      }

      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `KГ©rГ© ju: a nГӯ lГЎti jбә№МҒ pГ© ${issue.origin} ${sizing.verb} ${adj}${issue.minimum} ${sizing.unit}`;
        return `KГ©rГ© ju: a nГӯ lГЎti jбә№МҒ ${adj}${issue.minimum}`;
      }

      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `б»ҢМҖrб»ҚМҖ aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: gbб»ҚМҒdб»ҚМҖ bбә№МҖrбә№МҖ pбә№МҖlГә "${_issue.prefix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `б»ҢМҖrб»ҚМҖ aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: gbб»ҚМҒdб»ҚМҖ parГӯ pбә№МҖlГә "${_issue.suffix}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `б»ҢМҖrб»ҚМҖ aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: gbб»ҚМҒdб»ҚМҖ nГӯ "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `б»ҢМҖrб»ҚМҖ aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: gbб»ҚМҒdб»ҚМҖ bГЎ Г pбә№бә№rбә№ mu ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `Aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }

      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `Nб»ҚМҒmbГ  aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe: gbб»ҚМҒdб»ҚМҖ jбә№МҒ ГЁyГ  pГӯpГӯn ti ${issue.divisor}`;

      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `Bб»ҚtГ¬nГ¬ Г Г¬mб»ҚМҖ: ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;

      case "invalid_key":
        return `Bб»ҚtГ¬nГ¬ aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe nГӯnГә ${issue.origin}`;

      case "invalid_union":
        return "ГҢbГЎwб»ҚlГ© aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe";

      case "invalid_element":
        return `Iye aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe nГӯnГә ${issue.origin}`;

      default:
        return "ГҢbГЎwб»ҚlГ© aб№ЈГ¬б№Јe";
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\zh-CN.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "еӯ—з¬Ұ", verb: "еҢ…еҗ«" },
    file: { unit: "еӯ—иҠӮ", verb: "еҢ…еҗ«" },
    array: { unit: "йЎ№", verb: "еҢ…еҗ«" },
    set: { unit: "йЎ№", verb: "еҢ…еҗ«" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "иҫ“е…Ҙ",
    email: "з”өеӯҗйӮ®д»¶",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "иЎЁжғ…з¬ҰеҸ·",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISOж—Ҙжңҹж—¶й—ҙ",
    date: "ISOж—Ҙжңҹ",
    time: "ISOж—¶й—ҙ",
    duration: "ISOж—¶й•ҝ",
    ipv4: "IPv4ең°еқҖ",
    ipv6: "IPv6ең°еқҖ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4зҪ‘ж®ө",
    cidrv6: "IPv6зҪ‘ж®ө",
    base64: "base64зј–з Ғеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ",
    base64url: "base64urlзј–з Ғеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ",
    json_string: "JSONеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ",
    e164: "E.164еҸ·з Ғ",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "иҫ“е…Ҙ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
    number: "ж•°еӯ—",
    array: "ж•°з»„",
    null: "з©әеҖј(null)",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `ж— ж•Ҳиҫ“е…Ҙпјҡжңҹжңӣ instanceof ${issue.expected}пјҢе®һйҷ…жҺҘж”¶ ${received}`;
        }
        return `ж— ж•Ҳиҫ“е…Ҙпјҡжңҹжңӣ ${expected}пјҢе®һйҷ…жҺҘж”¶ ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `ж— ж•Ҳиҫ“е…Ҙпјҡжңҹжңӣ ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `ж— ж•ҲйҖүйЎ№пјҡжңҹжңӣд»ҘдёӢд№ӢдёҖ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `ж•°еҖјиҝҮеӨ§пјҡжңҹжңӣ ${issue.origin ?? "еҖј"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "дёӘе…ғзҙ "}`;
        return `ж•°еҖјиҝҮеӨ§пјҡжңҹжңӣ ${issue.origin ?? "еҖј"} ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `ж•°еҖјиҝҮе°Ҹпјҡжңҹжңӣ ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }
        return `ж•°еҖјиҝҮе°Ҹпјҡжңҹжңӣ ${issue.origin} ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") return `ж— ж•Ҳеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҡеҝ…йЎ»д»Ҙ "${_issue.prefix}" ејҖеӨҙ`;
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `ж— ж•Ҳеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҡеҝ…йЎ»д»Ҙ "${_issue.suffix}" з»“е°ҫ`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `ж— ж•Ҳеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҡеҝ…йЎ»еҢ…еҗ« "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `ж— ж•Ҳеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҡеҝ…йЎ»ж»Ўи¶іжӯЈеҲҷиЎЁиҫҫејҸ ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `ж— ж•Ҳ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `ж— ж•Ҳж•°еӯ—пјҡеҝ…йЎ»жҳҜ ${issue.divisor} зҡ„еҖҚж•°`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `еҮәзҺ°жңӘзҹҘзҡ„й”®(key): ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, ", ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `${issue.origin} дёӯзҡ„й”®(key)ж— ж•Ҳ`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "ж— ж•Ҳиҫ“е…Ҙ";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `${issue.origin} дёӯеҢ…еҗ«ж— ж•ҲеҖј(value)`;
      default:
        return `ж— ж•Ҳиҫ“е…Ҙ`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\ProjeҮЖo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\zod\src\v4\locales\zh-TW.ts" =====  
import type { $ZodStringFormats } from "../core/checks.js";
import type * as errors from "../core/errors.js";
import * as util from "../core/util.js";

const error: () => errors.$ZodErrorMap = () => {
  const Sizable: Record<string, { unit: string; verb: string }> = {
    string: { unit: "еӯ—е…ғ", verb: "ж“Ғжңү" },
