    file: { unit: "дҪҚе…ғзө„", verb: "ж“Ғжңү" },
    array: { unit: "й …зӣ®", verb: "ж“Ғжңү" },
    set: { unit: "й …зӣ®", verb: "ж“Ғжңү" },
  };

  function getSizing(origin: string): { unit: string; verb: string } | null {
    return Sizable[origin] ?? null;
  }

  const FormatDictionary: {
    [k in $ZodStringFormats | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    regex: "ијёе…Ҙ",
    email: "йғөд»¶ең°еқҖ",
    url: "URL",
    emoji: "emoji",
    uuid: "UUID",
    uuidv4: "UUIDv4",
    uuidv6: "UUIDv6",
    nanoid: "nanoid",
    guid: "GUID",
    cuid: "cuid",
    cuid2: "cuid2",
    ulid: "ULID",
    xid: "XID",
    ksuid: "KSUID",
    datetime: "ISO ж—ҘжңҹжҷӮй–“",
    date: "ISO ж—Ҙжңҹ",
    time: "ISO жҷӮй–“",
    duration: "ISO жңҹй–“",
    ipv4: "IPv4 дҪҚеқҖ",
    ipv6: "IPv6 дҪҚеқҖ",
    cidrv4: "IPv4 зҜ„еңҚ",
    cidrv6: "IPv6 зҜ„еңҚ",
    base64: "base64 з·Ёзўјеӯ—дёІ",
    base64url: "base64url з·Ёзўјеӯ—дёІ",
    json_string: "JSON еӯ—дёІ",
    e164: "E.164 ж•ёеҖј",
    jwt: "JWT",
    template_literal: "ијёе…Ҙ",
  };

  const TypeDictionary: {
    [k in errors.$ZodInvalidTypeExpected | (string & {})]?: string;
  } = {
    nan: "NaN",
  };

  return (issue) => {
    switch (issue.code) {
      case "invalid_type": {
        const expected = TypeDictionary[issue.expected] ?? issue.expected;
        const receivedType = util.parsedType(issue.input);
        const received = TypeDictionary[receivedType] ?? receivedType;
        if (/^[A-Z]/.test(issue.expected)) {
          return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„ијёе…ҘеҖјпјҡй җжңҹзӮә instanceof ${issue.expected}пјҢдҪҶж”¶еҲ° ${received}`;
        }
        return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„ијёе…ҘеҖјпјҡй җжңҹзӮә ${expected}пјҢдҪҶж”¶еҲ° ${received}`;
      }
      case "invalid_value":
        if (issue.values.length === 1) return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„ијёе…ҘеҖјпјҡй җжңҹзӮә ${util.stringifyPrimitive(issue.values[0])}`;
        return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„йҒёй …пјҡй җжңҹзӮәд»ҘдёӢе…¶дёӯд№ӢдёҖ ${util.joinValues(issue.values, "|")}`;
      case "too_big": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? "<=" : "<";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing)
          return `ж•ёеҖјйҒҺеӨ§пјҡй җжңҹ ${issue.origin ?? "еҖј"} жҮүзӮә ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()} ${sizing.unit ?? "еҖӢе…ғзҙ "}`;
        return `ж•ёеҖјйҒҺеӨ§пјҡй җжңҹ ${issue.origin ?? "еҖј"} жҮүзӮә ${adj}${issue.maximum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "too_small": {
        const adj = issue.inclusive ? ">=" : ">";
        const sizing = getSizing(issue.origin);
        if (sizing) {
          return `ж•ёеҖјйҒҺе°Ҹпјҡй җжңҹ ${issue.origin} жҮүзӮә ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()} ${sizing.unit}`;
        }
        return `ж•ёеҖјйҒҺе°Ҹпјҡй җжңҹ ${issue.origin} жҮүзӮә ${adj}${issue.minimum.toString()}`;
      }
      case "invalid_format": {
        const _issue = issue as errors.$ZodStringFormatIssues;
        if (_issue.format === "starts_with") {
          return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„еӯ—дёІпјҡеҝ…й Ҳд»Ҙ "${_issue.prefix}" й–Ӣй ӯ`;
        }
        if (_issue.format === "ends_with") return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„еӯ—дёІпјҡеҝ…й Ҳд»Ҙ "${_issue.suffix}" зөҗе°ҫ`;
        if (_issue.format === "includes") return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„еӯ—дёІпјҡеҝ…й ҲеҢ…еҗ« "${_issue.includes}"`;
        if (_issue.format === "regex") return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„еӯ—дёІпјҡеҝ…й Ҳз¬ҰеҗҲж јејҸ ${_issue.pattern}`;
        return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„ ${FormatDictionary[_issue.format] ?? issue.format}`;
      }
      case "not_multiple_of":
        return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„ж•ёеӯ—пјҡеҝ…й ҲзӮә ${issue.divisor} зҡ„еҖҚж•ё`;
      case "unrecognized_keys":
        return `з„Ўжі•иӯҳеҲҘзҡ„йҚөеҖј${issue.keys.length > 1 ? "еҖ‘" : ""}пјҡ${util.joinValues(issue.keys, "гҖҒ")}`;
      case "invalid_key":
        return `${issue.origin} дёӯжңүз„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„йҚөеҖј`;
      case "invalid_union":
        return "з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„ијёе…ҘеҖј";
      case "invalid_element":
        return `${issue.origin} дёӯжңүз„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„еҖј`;
      default:
        return `з„Ўж•Ҳзҡ„ијёе…ҘеҖј`;
    }
  };
};

export default function (): { localeError: errors.$ZodErrorMap } {
  return {
    localeError: error(),
  };
}
